title: Static Image Editor (E-commerce Ads)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled static image editor to create high-converting visuals for e-commerce marketing. Your work will be used across paid ads, landing pages, and
 campaigns, so performance matters just as much as design. This role is focused on direct response creative, not just aesthetic design.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating ad creatives such as before-and-after images, problem-solution visuals, UGC-style edits, and promotional graphics. You will edit and enhance product images, design scroll-stopping hooks, and incorporate strong text overlays that highlight key benefits and offers. You will also be expected to produce multiple variations of creatives for testing and continuously improve designs based on performance metrics like click-through rate and cost per acquisition.



The ideal candidate has experience in e-commerce or direct response design and understands what makes an ad convert. You should be comfortable using tools like Photoshop or Canva and be able to follow creative direction while also bringing your own ideas to the table. Speed and efficiency are important, as this role involves producing creatives consistently. Experience working with fashion or female-focused brands is a plus, but not required.



Compensation will be structured either per image or as a monthly retainer depending on your experience and output, with opportunities for performance-based bonuses tied to winning creatives.



To apply, please include a portfolio focused specifically on ad creatives rather than general design work, along with examples of high-converting images if available. Also include your typical turnaround time for a small batch of images and your preferred rate. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who understands that performance and results matter more than just making designs look good. If you have read this far, say apple at the bottom of application. Bonus if you meta advertisement stats in resume.



-make sure to include resume with example statics you have created in the past

?

?



?? Important

?

?

title: Kit + Content Ops Coordinator
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



With Dr Joy is hiring a part-time Kit + Content Ops Coordinator.

Part-time, 10 hours/week to start

$400/month to start, with potential to grow in scope and compensation over time



I’m looking for someone who is strong in execution.



This role is for a thoughtful, organized, detail-oriented person who can help with:



*
 marketing in Kit or a similar platform

* content publishing and backend organization

* launch support and follow-through

* simple, clean assets in Canva

* keeping systems organized in Notion



This is not mainly a social media role.

This is not a generic VA role.

This is not a strategy-only role.



I need someone who can take existing content and help get it built, published, organized, and out into the world.



What you’ll do



* Build and manage broadcasts, sequences, forms, tags, and automations in Kit or a similar platform

* Help turn existing content into
s, downloadable resources, and simple support assets

* Organize content, links, tasks, and SOPs in Notion

* Support launches and promotions by keeping details on track

* Create or adapt simple graphics and handouts in Canva

* Check links, formatting, downloads, and workflow details before things go live

Must-have experience



* Hands-on
 marketing experience

* Experience building or managing sequences, tags, forms, and automations

* Strong organization and attention to detail

* Strong written English

* Experience with Canva

* Experience with Notion or another project management/organization tool



Nice to have



* Experience with Kit

* Experience supporting online education, digital products, or content workflows

* Experience with course platforms or LMS tools

* Experience supporting a founder-led business



Not a fit if



* You mainly do social media

* You mainly want to do strategy

* You need step-by-step instructions for every small task

* You have not personally built automations before

* You are more of a designer than an operator



To apply

Start your message with: KIT FIRST



Then answer these questions:



1. What
 platforms have you used, and what exactly did you build in them?

2. Have you personally built sequences, tags, forms, or automations? Please describe.

3. What experience do you have with Notion, Canva, and content publishing?

4. Tell me about one project where you helped get content fully published or operationalized.

5. What is your rate or salary expectation for 10–15 hours/week?

6. Please include your resume or LinkedIn and your availability.



Finalists may be asked to complete a short paid test task.

title: AI Video Content Creator
description:
We're looking for someone to generate AI-powered video and image content for Instagram models on an ongoing basis. You'll be given reference videos (from Instagram, TikTok, etc.) and your job is to face-swap our model into those videos using Higgsfield and 
(
). The final output needs to look as realistic as possible — if it looks AI, it's unusable. You'll be extracting first frames, generating face-swapped frames with correct proportions (head size, body, skin tone), and then running the full video generation workflow. Quality control is critical: every frame you produce has to pass a side-by-side comparison with the original and look like a real person, not an AI render.



This is a flexible, remote role. Active work is roughly 1–2 hours per session to set up and queue videos, then you wait for them to generate. You should be comfortable working independently, using your own judgment on what looks good vs. bad, and communicating async via
. Experience with AI image generation tools (Higgsfield, ComfyUI, Stable Diffusion, etc.) is a strong plus but not required — we have a full SOP that walks you through every step. What matters most is attention to detail, a good eye for what looks real, and the ability to follow instructions precisely.

Occasionally assist with uploading and general video management tasks



Details:

You'll work across very different video styles and formats, so we're looking for someone who's adaptable and genuinely enjoys variety. Sourcing the right footage and assets is part of the job, so a proactive and resourceful mindset is a must. We offer automatic pay raises after a successful period working together, and we're open to schedule adjustments if needed.



To apply:



Please send samples showcasing a range of your editing styles, along with a short note about your experience and the tools you typically work with.



Thanks!

title: Digital Marketer
description:
About Us

tripleN Business Solutions is an Australian-based marketing consultancy specialising in the automotive industry. We partner with dealerships across WA to deliver high-performing digital campaigns, lead generation strategies, and creative marketing solutions.



As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team and take ownership of paid media campaigns across multiple platforms.





About the Role



This is a hands-on role ideal for someone who lives and breathes performance marketing. You will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimising paid advertising campaigns—primarily across Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram)—with a strong focus on generating qualified leads and measurable ROI.



Key Responsibilities

 • Plan, build, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube)

 • Create and optimise Meta Ads campaigns 
 & Instagram)

 • Monitor campaign performance and continuously optimise for conversions

 • Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and A/B testing

 • Develop compelling ad copy and work with designers on creative assets

 • Analyse data and provide clear, actionable performance reports

 • Manage budgets effectively to maximise ROI

 • Stay up to date with platform updates, trends, and best practices





Skills & Experience

 • Proven experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns (agency or in-house)

 • Strong understanding of conversion tracking, GA4, and performance metrics

 • Experience with lead generation campaigns (highly desirable)

 • Ability to interpret data and make strategic optimisation decisions

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple campaigns



Highly Regarded (but not essential):

 • Experience with TikTok Ads and LinkedIn Ads

 • Experience working in the automotive industry

 • Familiarity with CRM integrations and lead tracking systems





What We’re Looking For

 • A proactive, self-driven marketer who takes ownership

 • Someone who can think strategically but execute tactically

 • Strong communication skills and ability to work remotely

 • A problem-solver who is constantly looking to improve performance





Why Join tripleN

 • Work with a growing, specialised marketing consultancy

 • Exposure to multiple brands and high-impact campaigns

 • Flexible working arrangements (remote-friendly)

 • Opportunity to grow with the business and shape campaign strategy





How to Apply



If you’re passionate about performance marketing and want to be part of a growing Australian agency, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply now with your resume and a brief summary of campaigns you’ve managed (including results).

description:
We are a fast-growing European e-commerce brand selling across Amazon EU, 
 and other marketplaces, supported by a main warehouse in the Netherlands and multiple external fulfillment networks (FBA & LVB).



We are looking for a structured and hands-on Supply Chain Coordinator / Specialist to own replenishment execution, shipment coordination, and inventory control.



This is NOT an admin role.

This is a planning, execution and control role.



Responsibilities:



• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB from our NL main warehouse

• Balance stock across external warehouses while protecting main warehouse levels

• Plan based on daily sales velocity, stock on hand, and incoming inventory

• Prioritize fast restocking of out-of-stock SKUs

• Create and manage FBA shipments in Seller Central (box & pallet)

• Coordinate shipments with our fulfillment partner and carriers

• Manage pallet bookings via Amazon Freight

• Support AGL container planning where relevant

• Maintain shipment tracking and PO planning in Airtable

• Allocate order line quantities across containers (manual allocation)

• Organize and upload shipping documents accurately

• Maintain clear inbound visibility at all times



Requirements:



• 2–4+ years experience with Amazon FBA operations

• Strong understanding of replenishment planning and inventory flow

• Experience with international freight and warehouse coordination

• Strong Airtable / spreadsheet skills

• High attention to detail and structured working style

• Proactive, ownership-driven mindset



Note: LVB is a Dutch fulfillment platform. Prior experience with LVB is not required, as we will train you.



We value structure, precision and accountability.



To apply, answer with a 1 minute video introducing yourself and why you think you would be a good fit for this role.

title: Virtual Assistant - Lead Generation, Prospecting & Appointment Setting
description:
Lead Generation & Appointment Setting Virtual Assistant for InnovaGuest



Hiring an experienced virtual assistant for InnovaGuest, to help us with our lead generation strategy, prospecting, CRM management, cold outreach & appointment setting.



What we’re looking for:



InnovaGuest is looking for an experienced & flexible virtual assistant to join our growing hospitality CRM &
 marketing agency. Your role will be focused on lead generation & prospecting, cold outreach, appointment setting & CRM management.



This is a freelance role, ideal for dedicated & professional virtual assistants seeking ongoing, long-term collaboration. You will work alongside the founder to help develop our sales & lead generation processes, in direct, daily comms.



You must be experienced in lead generation & appointment setting, with experience working with CRMs. Ideally, you would have experience using tools like Hubspot, Salesforce, Attio, Folk CRM, Clay, Linkedin Sales Navigator, or other lead generation tools. You must also have a high English proficiency level, as you will be in communications with both our team & our clients. Experience working with other agencies, consultants, or service providers is preferred.





You SHOULD apply if you already have experience providing lead generation services to agencies, consultants, or service providers, with a clear understanding of what strategies & tools you need to use to deliver results. You should NOT apply if you do not have any experience working in lead generation.



We need a highly motivated, committed & professional virtual assistant for our team, who cares about their work & cares about delivering results. You should be fast & flexible, able to start quickly, implementing experience, strategies, tools & practices that you have used in your previous work. You should also be comfortable using AI as a part of your workflow, for efficiency, productivity, & scalability. 



About Us:



InnovaGuest is a young, growing agency that's already generated £100,000’s for global hospitality clients. We’re looking for a team player that wants to grow with us long-term, building the role & making their mark.



If you have previous experience working with other agencies, consultancies or service providers, we want your skills & expertise, as well as your experience with systems, processes, tools & best practices.





The perfect candidate can help grow InnovaGuest & make the company better. The perfect candidate will also have opportunities to grow into senior roles as we grow.



What the Role Involves Day-to-Day:

Lead Generation:

- Prospecting hospitality businesses (restaurants, hotels, vacation rentals) using tools like OpenTable, LinkedIn, Instagram & Google Maps.

- Following ICP documentation, to ensure each lead recorded is fitting & high-quality.

- Recording, managing & organising leads inside our CRM.

- Capturing verified contact details, such as
 & phone number. 





Cold Outreach & Appointment Setting:

- Responsible for cold outreach, using platforms like Instagram, Linkedin & Cold
.

- Following up with leads consistently & in a timely manner. 

- Recording contacts & touchpoints, as well as key details, in our CRM.

- Appointment setting, using the founder’s calendar. 

- Following-up with booked calls, to ensure a high show rate. 





Additional Tasks:

- Setting up new lead generation & prospecting tools.

- Building sales/lead generation workflows. 





What Success Looks Like:

After 90 days, you'll be a high-performing virtual assistant if you are able to achieve these benchmarks:

- Prospecting & generating consistently high-quality leads & verified contact details, with 95-99?curacy.

- Booking 2-5+ meetings with ICP or market-qualified leads each week.

- Sending
cold outbound messages to as many prospects each week.

- Following up with every lead a total of 3x times (1st contact + 2 follow-ups), every time.

- Ensuring every lead receives a response in no more than 12-24 hours on weekdays.

- Ensuring a show-up rate of 66-75%+.





What You Need For the Role:

- Must have a native or bilingual English proficiency level.

- Must be available for 20-30 hours/week.

- 2+ years of lead generation, prospecting & appointment setting experience.

- Experience using lead generation & CRM tools (e.g. Hubspot, Salesforce, Attio).

- Comfortable adjusting working hours to European & North American timezones. 





Character Skills Required:

- Communication, great speaker & writer, conversational, with fluent English.

- Fast-mover, able to develop, iterate, & execute new strategies quickly.

- Leadership, owning their area of work, suggesting new approaches & improvements.

- Attention to detail, focusing on the minor details that make the difference.

- Proactive at suggesting improvements, flagging issues, not waiting to be told.

- Collaborative team player, with both tea
mbers & clients.

- Positive, enthusiastic and passionate, bringing everybody up.





Compensation & Benefits:

- $3-7 Hourly rate, that increases over time.

- Fully remote, work from anywhere, with time & timezone flexibility.

- Opportunities to grow into senior & leadership roles.

- $520 yearly Language Learning Stipend (after 3-month trial period).

- Work with leading hospitality brands, including Michelin Star restaurants & multi-location groups/chains.





To be considered, complete the application form here:

title: Client Success Manager — Meta Ads + GoHighLevel + Client Management (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Kaizen Collective

We're an Australian marketing systems agency. We build and manage client acquisition engines for service businesses — physios, mortgage brokers, real estate agents, coaches, tradies.

We install the full system: Meta ads, GHL automations, lead funnels, CRM pipelines. Then we run it. Our clients pay us to get results and stay supported. That's where you come in.



This Role Requires Three Things. All Three. No Exceptions.

1. Meta Ads — you need to be genuinely good at this.

Not dabbled in it. Not helped someone else run it. You've managed campaigns end to end. You know what a bad CPL looks like, why it's happening, and how to fix it. You've built campaigns from scratch, killed underperformers, and scaled winners. You check accounts daily and make decisions without being told to.

2. GoHighLevel — you need to know it inside out.

Sub-account setup, pipeline configuration, automation workflows, calendar integration, lead forms, snapshots. You don't need training on the basics. You need to be the person who gives the training.

3. Client management — you need to be genuinely good with people.

You're the primary point of contact for our clients. You communicate in Slack. You respond fast, explain clearly, and keep people calm when things aren't working. Clients feel supported because of you.

If you're strong in two of these and learning the third, this isn't the right role. We need all three.



What You'll Be Doing Day to Day



Onboarding new clients — setting up their GHL sub-accounts, connecting ad accounts, getting them live

Building Meta Ads campaigns from scratch — campaign structure, ad sets, targeting, creative briefs, pixel/CAPI setup

Daily ad account management across multiple clients — monitoring spend, CPL, CTR, frequency, and making optimisation calls

Building GHL workflows and automations — lead sequences, pipeline automations, follow-up flows, calendar booking

Answering client questions in Slack — clearly, quickly, no fluff

Flagging issues before clients notice them

Keeping multiple clients on track simultaneously





You're The Right Person If:



You've managed Meta lead gen campaigns with real ad spend (not boosted posts)

You know what CPL, CTR, frequency, and learning phase mean — and what to do about each

You've built GHL sub-accounts and automation workflows from scratch, not just maintained someone else's

You communicate in writing better than most people do in person

You manage your own workload without being micromanaged

You flag problems early instead of hoping they resolve themselves

You're fast. Not rushing — fast. You know the difference.





This Is Not The Role If:



You need daily check-ins to know what to do

Your GHL experience is mostly watching tutorials

You've run Meta ads but never owned the results

Client-facing work stresses you out





Role Details



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Remote — work from anywhere

Australian business hours required (AEST overlap, minimum 6 hours)

Salary: [insert range]

Start: ASAP





How to Apply

Send your application with:



Your resume

A Loom video (3–5 mins) — walk us through a Meta Ads campaign you've managed (show the account if you can), walk us through a GHL workflow you've built, and tell us how you manage client communication day to day

Your answer to this question in writing: A client messages you in Slack at 9am saying their leads have dropped off in the last 4 days. What do you do?



Applications without the Loom video and written answer will not be reviewed.

title: Technology Operations Specialist
description:
Remote | Full-time | US Pacific Time



What You Will Do



Keep the engine running. You are in charge of everything tech. When something breaks at 2am, you're the one who wakes up and fixes it (rare, but it happens).



Be the first responder. Phishing attempt? You lock it down, trace the damage, reset credentials, and brief the team on what happened. Vendor API breaks? You diagnose it, work with their support team, and get us back online. You solve problems.



Build things with AI. When someone on the team says "I wish we had a tool that does __________," you sit down and build a working version that afternoon. You do not need to be a software engineer, but you vibe code, test, and ship a functional internal tool.



Make smart technology decisions. You evaluate new technologies. You are learning, always, constantly, every day.



You will report directly to the president of the firm.



You will own all the problems and be the hero when you solve them.



To Apply



-Tell us about the last tech problem you solved. Be detailed.

-Look at our company, do some research, and tell us what you think you can do for a consulting firm like ours.

-Share LinkedIn or link to your resume.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Youtube Long-form Video Editor
description:
Job Overview

We're looking for a creative and detail-oriented YouTube Video Editor and channel Manager to join our growing team. You’ll be responsible for editing high-quality, engaging videos and managing the entire content workflow on the channel.



Key Responsibilities

Video Editing

Edit long-form and short-form YouTube content (B-roll, motion graphics, subtitles, pacing, transitions, etc.)

Qualifications & Skills

Excellent communication skills (clear, professional, and empathetic).

Strong problem-solving ability—quickly diagnose client challenges and offer solutions.

Tech-savvy & adaptable—comfortable learning new tools like Zoom, 
, and project management apps.

What We Offer

Full-time Position

Opportunity to work with a dynamic and creative team.

Competitive Salary + Performance Bonus

Stability & Growth: We're committed to your success and offer a stable work environment where you can thrive and grow.

title: Virtual Assistant – Full Training Provided
description:
!!!Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service.



We are a growing company looking for a Virtual Assistant who is eager to grow, takes ownership, and follows instructions carefully. We provide full training on:



Sales and marketing

Customer service and admin tasks

Product listings and e-commerce support

Photo and video editing

Automation tools (including n8n,pabbly and zapier)

SEO and copywriting

Other business operations as needed



Role Overview



You will support the team with day to day tasks, help improve processes, and learn new tools and skills as the company grows. This is a remote role with long term growth potential for the right person.



Qualifications:



Exceptional attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

Proficiency in data management, including advanced skills in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Basic graphic design skills using Canva.

Eager to learn and adapt to new tools and strategies.

Knowledge of understanding processes, documentation of process, documentation of errors in process and propose solutions for errors in process

Comfortable learning new tools and systems (Google Workspace, communication and project tools).

Self motivated, proactive, and open to feedback.

Reliable computer/laptop and stable internet connection.

Big plus if you understand automations like pabbly, zapier, n8n



Experience as a VA is a plus but not required; full training is provided for the right candidate.



How to Apply:



To help us get to know you better, follow these instructions exactly. Applications that do not include all items below will not be reviewed.



1 - Take this DISC test: 
/disc-personality-test/

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

2 - Personality Test (16 Personalities) Take this test: 
/free-personality-test

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

3 - Take this typing test (30 seconds): 
p?minutes=0.5&textfile=0&mode=sent&result_url=
p&bt=0>=normal

Send a link to your results/confirmation page (not a screenshot).

4 - Attach your updated resume, highlighting your most relevant experience and skills.?

Video(s)

5 - Record a video or multiple short videos answering the questions below. Upload them to a platform (e.g., Google Drive, YouTube, Loom) and make sure the links are public/viewable.

a. About You & Your Goals

Introduce yourself and share your hobbies/passions.

Explain your career, life, and financial goals and in what time frame.

Be very specific: What are you saving money for? What specific item/asset is it? When do you expect to acquire it? How do you plan on achieving that goal?

b. Work & Tech Setup

Show your work setup (computer/laptop, monitor(s), speakers, lights, etc).

Show your tech setup: browser you use, other tech/platforms or tools you regularly use.

c. Process & Problem Solving with AI

Think of one objective you’ve had to complete (for work, school, or a project).

What metrics were you measured on (time, money, quality, etc)?

Reverse engineer the objective with the target measurement in mind.

Map out your process in Google Docs, Google Sheets, or Canva as a visual representation.

Explain how you could have made it easier/faster/better using AI.





 Subject Line



When you send your application, use this exact subject line:

“Virtual Assistant Application – [Your Full Name] – [Your Main Skill]”

In the body of your
/message, briefly share:

What you already know you are good at.

What skill(s) you want to learn next from this role (e.g., SEO, automation, copywriting, editing, etc.).

Company: Habits 365 Greek

Location: Remote (India)

Compensation: $500 per month

Work Schedule: 6 days a week | US business hours



Role Description



Habits 365 Greek is a custom apparel company specializing in merchandise for Greek life and collegiate organizations across the United States.

We are looking for a Licensing Associate to manage the end-to-end licensing approval process for all designs before they move into production.

You will work closely with the art team, sales team, and external licensing bodies (including Affinity) to ensure designs are submitted correctly, tracked actively, and approved on time.

This role requires speed, attention to detail, strong judgment, and constant follow-through.



Key Responsibilities

1. Review designs created by the art team for Greek and collegiate compliance

2. Submit Greek organization designs to Affinity for approval

3. Evaluate collegiate designs based on college-specific licensing rules and restrictions

4. Ensure designs meet requirements before submission to avoid rejections

5. Actively track all submissions and monitor approval/rejection status in real time

6. Follow up proactively to avoid delays in approvals

7. Immediately communicate approvals or rejections to sales associates and internal teams

8. Ensure no production moves forward without proper licensing clearance

9. Identify patterns in approvals/rejections to improve future submissions



What We’re Looking For

- Strong written and oral communication skills 

- Prior experience in custom apparel, licensing, or a related industry

- Strong understanding (or ability to quickly learn) Greek and collegiate licensing requirements

- Fast, detail-oriented, and highly responsive

- Strong presence of mind and decision-making ability

- Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, process-driven environment

- Sincere, reliable, and accountable for outcomes

title: Social media content manager / creator
description:
Job Title: Social Media Content Manager (5-Week Intensive Brand Transformation Project)

About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated and creative Social Media Content Manager for a fast-paced, 5-week intensive project. The primary goal is to completely organize, transform, and elevate our client’s social media presence and branding. This is a time-sensitive project requiring extremely aggressive, geo-location focused exposure to keep the client at the forefront of their industry with a heavy, hyped, and consistent online presence ASAP.



If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love building massive brand awareness rapidly through hyper-local targeting, and excel at daily content generation, this role is for you!



Key Responsibilities

 • Brand Transformation: Completely overhaul and organize the client’s current social media profiles to ensure a cohesive, professional, and highly engaging brand identity.

 • Daily Content Generation: Create, curate, and schedule high-quality daily content across multiple platforms to maintain a heavy online presence.

 • Aggressive, Geo-Targeted Exposure Strategy: Implement extremely aggressive, hype-driven strategies designed for rapid growth and maximum visibility within the 5-week timeframe, with a strict focus on specific geo-locations.

 • Daily Client Collaboration: Connect with the client daily via WhatsApp to align on goals, provide updates, and gather insights.

 • Leverage Backend Resources: Utilize the client’s dedicated backend page, which provides daily content suggestions and inspiration, to streamline the creation process.

 • Rapid Video Assembly: Quickly edit and assemble high-quality videos using raw content and footage uploaded directly to the client’s platform.



Requirements

 • Proven experience as a Social Media Manager, Content Creator, or similar role, with a portfolio showcasing successful brand transformations or rapid growth campaigns.

 • Expertise in managing and growing presence on specific platforms: WhatsApp,
, Instagram, and TikTok, with a strong understanding of geo-tagging and local algorithm optimization.

 • Strong graphic design and rapid video editing skills (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, CapCut, etc.) to produce eye-catching content quickly from raw footage provided on the platform.

 • Excellent written communication skills with a knack for engaging copywriting.

 • Highly organized, proactive, and capable of meeting tight, time-sensitive deadlines.

 • Reliable internet connection and availability for daily check-ins via WhatsApp.



Project Details

 • Duration: 5 Weeks (Intensive Project)

 • Communication: Daily updates and collaboration via WhatsApp.

 • Resources Provided: Access to a backend page with daily content suggestions to help guide your creative process.

title: Mental Health Billing Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Mental Health Billing Specialist (Remote)



Healthcare Partners Consulting & Billing is seeking an experienced Mental Health Billing Specialist to join our team.



This is not a “submit claims and move on” position. We are looking for someone who understands the full revenue cycle and takes responsibility for getting providers paid accurately and timely.



If you are used to pushing claims and waiting, this is not the role for you.



About this role:

You will be responsible for managing claims from submission through payment, identifying issues, and resolving them. This includes working denials, following up with payers, and ensuring claims are processed correctly from the start.



Responsibilities include:



Submitting clean claims for mental health services

Reviewing sessions to ensure billing accuracy before submission

Following up on unpaid and underpaid claims

Working denials and rejections with urgency and accuracy

Communicating with insurance companies and documenting reference numbers

Identifying patterns and reporting issues that impact revenue

Maintaining accurate notes and documentation in all systems



Requirements:



Minimum 2 years of mental health billing experience

Strong understanding of the full revenue cycle, not just claim submission

Experience working with insurance companies and handling denials

Ability to read and interpret EOBs and payer responses

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple providers and priorities at once



Our expectation:

Submitting claims is the lowest level of this role. The value is in identifying problems, preventing denials, and getting claims paid.



We expect our team to understand payer behavior, stay current, and embrace AI and technology to improve efficiency. If you are not willing to learn and adapt, this will not be a fit.



Schedule:



Monday through Thursday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Friday: Half day. 8-1



Compensation & Benefits:



Salary based on experience

Career ladder with growth opportunities

Paid holidays (US Holidays)



How to Apply (Read Carefully):



Complete the online job application below

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

Strong sense of rhythm, pacing, and visual storytelling



Reliable communication and attention to deadlines



Organized, detail-oriented, and eager to learn



Positive attitude and a team-first mindset



What We Offer



Remote, full-time position



Consistent projects and long-term growth opportunities



Flexible schedule tied to project deadlines



Supportive and collaborative creative team



How to Apply

No résumé needed — we care most about your skills and personality.

 with the subject line:

title: Financial Data Analyst (SQL Focus | Finance & Analytics Support)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly analytical Financial Data Analyst to support our finance and business teams through data-driven insights and reporting.



This role focuses on financial data analysis, reporting, and visualization, leveraging tools such as SQL and Excel to support business decisions. The ideal candidate has a strong foundation in finance and accounting principles, combined with technical expertise in handling large datasets and building meaningful reports.



You’ll play a key role in transforming data into actionable insights, ensuring accuracy, and supporting financial reporting cycles.



Key Responsibilities

-Data Analysis & Reporting

Perform data analysis, reporting, and visualization to support finance and business teams

Prepare and present financial reports, identifying trends and key insights for stakeholders



-SQL & Data Management

Use SQL to query large datasets, ensuring accurate and efficient data retrieval

Assist in troubleshooting data-related issues and ensuring data integrity across platforms



-Financial Modeling & Excel Support

Leverage Excel for advanced data manipulation, financial modeling, and reporting

Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis tasks



-Financial Reporting Support

Provide support for monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting cycles

Assist in ensuring timely and accurate financial reporting



-Process Improvement & Collaboration

Assist in improving data processes and optimizing reporting efficiency

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data needs and deliver tailored reports



Qualifications



Mandatory Qualifications

Intermediate to expert proficiency in SQL for data analysis and reporting

Expert-level skills in Microsoft Excel (formulas, pivot tables, advanced functions)

Basic understanding of finance and accounting principles (e.g., general ledger, financial statements, budgeting, forecasting)



Preferred Qualifications

Exposure to NetSuite, including integration and report generation

Experience using Tableau for dashboards and data visualization

Familiarity with Snowflake data warehouse and its functionalities



Skills & Attributes

Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities

Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data insights to non-technical stakeholders

High attention to detail and accuracy in working with data

Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines

Proactive in identifying opportunities for process improvements and automation



Education & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or a related field

3+ years of experience in financial analysis, data analysis, or a similar role involving financial data



Application Instructions

To be considered for this position, please submit the following:

*Your application letter

*Unrestricted link to your updated resume/CV



Subject Line: FinDataAnalyst – YOUR FULL NAME



!!! Only applicants who meet the required qualifications will be contacted.

title: Sales Team Lead - Remote Tech Startup (Performance Bonuses + Growth Path)
description:
We run a high-growth online platform that converts web traffic into paying customers using a mix of live sales reps and AI-assisted workflows. We're doing six figures monthly and scaling fast. We need a Sales Operations Manager to own the entire live sales function - the team, the systems, the numbers. You'll report directly to the founder.



You'll manage a team of sales reps who handle live customer conversations. Your job is to make them better, make the operation bigger, and make the numbers go up. Specifically:

- Hire, train, schedule, and hold reps accountable

- Own the full conversation-to-conversion funnel - first message to paid customer

- Analyze conversation logs, build scripts and playbooks, and push conversion rates up week over week

- Scale the team as traffic grows without letting conversion quality drop

- Track and report key metrics: conversion rate, revenue per rep, response times, conversations handled

- Build SOPs and training materials so new hires ramp fast

- Coordinate with the ads team on traffic volume, audience quality, and timing



You:

- 2+ years managing a sales or customer-facing team (not just individual contributor experience)

- You think in conversion rates, not vibes - decisions backed by data

- Strong written English

- You build systems and enforce them

- Comfortable with remote async tools

- Available for set working hours - this is a real full-time role, not freelance



Big Plus

- Experience with AI-assisted sales workflows or hybrid human/AI operations

- Track record of measurably improving conversion rates

- Experience managing remote teams across time zones



Compensation

- 78,500PHP/mo starting base (~$1,300 USD), adjusted for experience

- Performance bonuses tied to conversion targets and revenue milestones

- Direct access to the founder - your input shapes company strategy

- Clear growth path - as the operation scales, so does your role and comp



To Apply

Send a message with: who you are, your relevant experience, the largest team you've managed, and your resume

title: Marketing Executive Assistant
description:
The **Executive & Marketing Operations VA** will manage the agency’s internal operations, client communications, influencer coordination, and marketing deliverables. This role requires someone who is **organized, tech-savvy, and confident in handling both administrative and marketing-related workflows**.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### **1. Admin & Executive Support**



- Manage daily calendar, inbox, and scheduling needs.

- Prepare meeting notes, agendas, and follow-ups.

- Keep internal systems organized (Google Drive, Slack, ClickUp).

- Handle contracts, invoices, and small administrative tasks.



### **2. Client & Partner Operations**



- Manage client onboarding (contracts, payments, onboarding forms).

- Schedule and coordinate weekly client check-ins.

- Update dashboards, campaign trackers, and reports.

- Send weekly performance recaps and maintain records.



### **3. Creator & Influencer Operations (Influencer Farming™)**



- Research and vet creators for campaigns.

- Manage outreach, follow-ups, and deliverables.

- Track submissions, approvals, and performance results.

- Request Spark codes / whitelisting permissions as needed.



### **4. TikTok Shop Management**



- Upload and optimize product listings (keywords, visuals, descriptions).

- Track sample shipments and creator deliveries.

- Post and schedule TikTok Shop content.

- Monitor engagement and performance data.



### **5. Creative & Ad Support**



- Organize creative assets (videos, photos, briefs).

- Maintain creative performance logs (CTR, CPA, ROAS).

- Transcribe creative review calls and extract insights.

- Assist in preparing creative briefs and campaign docs.



### **6. Systems & SOP Management**



- Turn Loom videos into step-by-step SOPs.

- Maintain ClickUp or Notion dashboards for workflow tracking.

- Support automation setup using Zapier or Make.



### **7. Personal Support (Optional)**



- Coordinate travel and scheduling logistics.

- Handle personal admin or organizational tasks as needed.



---



## Requirements



- **2–3 years of experience** as an Executive Assistant, Marketing Assistant, or Project Coordinator.

- **Marketing or agency background** preferred (client or campaign management experience).

- **Strong organizational and project management skills** — able to handle multiple campaigns simultaneously.

- **Excellent communication skills** (verbal and written).

- **Detail-oriented** with strong follow-through.

- **Tech-savvy** and comfortable learning new tools quickly.



---



## **Tools and Systems Used**



- Slack

- Google Drive

- ClickUp / Notion

- TikTok Shop

- Canva / Figma

- Meta Ads Manager

- Zapier / Make



If you think you're the one we're looking for, kindly send your updated CV along with a 1-2min self intro. Thank you!

title: Real Estate ISA – Buyer Leads (Phone-Based, High Performance)
description:
IMPORTANT – READ CAREFULLY



To be considered, start your application with this exact phrase:



Speed to Lead is my priority.



Applications without this exact phrase will be automatically rejected.



ABOUT THE ROLE



This is a high-performance phone-based role inside a real estate and mortgage business.



This is NOT:



an admin job

a chat support role

a side job



Phone work is the core of this position.



You will:



Call new inbound buyer leads within 1–3 minutes

Follow up with warm and aged CRM leads

Make 80–120 outbound calls daily

Reactivate old leads who previously showed interest

Set buyer consultation appointments

Push clients to complete a mortgage application BEFORE the appointment

Confirm appointments and reduce no-shows

Log all activity accurately in CRM



IMPORTANT PERFORMANCE RULE



Appointments without a completed application are NOT considered success.



Your job is NOT just to set appointments.

Your job is to move clients toward completing a mortgage application.



COMPENSATION



Base Salary: $400/month



Performance bonuses:



Per client who ATTENDS the appointment

Per completed mortgage application (application + docs submitted)

Per closed transaction



Expected earnings after 60 days for a strong performer:

$1,200–$2,000+/month



SCHEDULE



- Monday to Friday  

- Fixed schedule: 9:00 AM – 6:30 PM Pacific Time  



Includes:

- 30-minute lunch break  

- Two 10-minute paid breaks  



Daily structure:



- 9:00 AM – 11:30 AM ? Work  

- 11:30 AM – 11:40 AM ? Break  

- 11:40 AM – 2:10 PM ? Work  

- 2:10 PM – 2:40 PM ? Lunch  

- 2:40 PM – 4:10 PM ? Work  

- 4:10 PM – 4:20 PM ? Break  

- 4:20 PM – 6:00 PM ? Work  

- 6:00 PM – 6:30 PM ? KPI Reporting & CRM Updates  



You must be online and ready at exactly 9:00 AM Pacific Time.



Incomplete KPI reporting will be considered a performance issue.

Full focus required during shift



REQUIREMENTS



Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, no heavy accent)

Strong phone presence (you must sound natural and in control)

Experience in cold calling, sales, or real estate ISA is preferred

Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent

Fast learner and coachable



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Minimum 100 Mbps internet

Backup internet required

Quiet workspace

Quality headset

All calls and messages must go through CRM



QUALIFICATION QUESTIONS (ANSWER ALL IN NUMBERED FORMAT)



Can you guarantee 1–3 minute response time to new leads? How?

What is the highest number of calls you’ve made in one day?

How many calls per hour can you consistently maintain?

Describe your experience with phone-based sales or cold calling

How do you handle rejection during long calling sessions?

What CRM systems have you used and what exactly did you do in them?

How fast can you learn a new CRM system?

What is your internet speed (download/upload)?

Describe your backup internet setup

Are you comfortable being evaluated based on performance (calls, appointments, applications)?



FINAL STEP:



Write 3–4 sentences where you SELL a buyer consultation call to a potential client.

title: Virtual Assistant & Executive Assistant (Short-Term Rental Operations) Xenia Living LLC | Remote (International)
description:
About Xenia Living

Xenia Living LLC is a fast-growing short-term and mid-term rental management company focused on delivering five-star guest experiences while maximizing returns for property owners. We operate across multiple properties and markets, balancing hospitality excellence with strong systems and efficient operations.

Our focus:

 • Exceptional guest stays

 • Clear and transparent owner communication

The Role

We are looking for a highly proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who will also serve as an Executive Assistant to leadership.

This is a dynamic role where you will:

 • Handle real-time guest communication and operations

 • Support internal processes and reporting

 • Assist leadership with execution and coordination

You will work 40 hours per week across 5 days, aligned with U.S. time zones. Flexibility is important, as overtime may be required during high-demand periods such as weekends, turnovers, and peak seasons.



Core Responsibilities

Guest Operations (Approx. 60%)

• Monitor Airbnb, VRBO, 
, and messaging platforms and respond quickly (target: within minutes)

 • Handle guest concerns, resolve issues, and de-escalate situations professionally

 • Coordinate with cleaning and maintenance teams and confirm completion with photos/videos

 • Assist with check-ins, turnovers, extensions, and guest requests

 • Manage alterations and requests in line with company policies

 • Track issues, flag recurring problems, and ensure resolution

 • Assist with review management, responses, and damage claims



Owner & Team Coordination (Approx. 20%)

• Support reporting on revenue, occupancy, and guest experience metrics

 • Maintain and improve SOPs and internal documentation

 • Coordinate with internal teams (cleaning, maintenance, guest support)

 • Assist with daily task tracking and operational follow-ups

 • Identify inefficiencies and suggest process improvements



Executive Assistance (Approx. 20%)

• Manage calendars and scheduling across time zones

 • Draft
s, messages, and internal communications

 • Assist with research (vendors, tools, market insights)

 • Support leadership with projects and priorities

 • Help organize workflows and internal systems



Must-Have Qualifications

• 2+ years experience as a Virtual Assistant in short-term rental, hospitality, or property management

 • Strong understanding of STR operations (turnovers, guest communication, pricing, etc.)

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Highly responsive and able to work in a fast-paced environment

 • Strong problem-solving skills and ownership mindset

 • Experience with:



Airbnb, VRBO, 

PMS tools (Hostaway or similar)

Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom

Notion or similar documentation tools

• Ability to work consistently within U.S. time zone coverage



Nice-to-Have

• Experience with pricing tools like PriceLabs

 • Familiarity with automation tools (Zapier, Make)

 • Bookkeeping or reconciliation experience

 • Experience supporting founders or executives

 • Background in operations or process improvement



Success Metrics (First 90 Days)

• Maintain 95%+ response rate within 5 minutes for guest communication

 • Zero missed urgent issues or escalations

 • Strong coordination with cleaning and maintenance teams

 • At least 2 process improvements that increase efficiency

 • Positive impact on guest experience and reviews



Compensation & Benefits

• Compensation: $800 – $1000/month (based on experience)

 • Flexible work environment with potential for additional hours based on business needs

 • Growth opportunities into:

Operations Manager

Executive Operations / Chief of Staff roles





How to Apply

Please follow the steps below to complete your application:

1. Record a 1-minute video introduction answering:

 • Who you are

 • Your experience in short-term rentals or hospitality

 • Why you thrive in fast-paced environments

2. Upload your video and résumé to a shared folder (Google Drive, Dropbox, or any cloud storage)

 • Place both your video and résumé in the same folder

 • Make sure the link is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

3. Copy the folder link

4. Fill out the application form (link provided in the job post) and paste your folder link where required

Your job is to step in at the right 
nt — guide them, qualify them, and make sure they actually show up.

Working consistently during US time zones + weekends

Your calling or customer-facing experience

Your availability (US hours + weekends)

Why this role fits you



We’re hiring one person for this role.

If you want a setup where the calls make sense and your effort actually pays off — apply now.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Storytelling + Clip Arrangement)
description:
PLEASE READ ALL INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY AND ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXTENSIVE EXPERIENCE EDITING COMPELLING SHORT-FORM VIDEOS



We're expanding our team! Are you a talented video editor with a strong instinct for pacing, storytelling, and shot selection? I’m looking for a highly skilled editor to join our team of 3 editors to help finalize fast-paced, engaging social media videos for my platforms.



This is not a full start-to-finish editing role. This is a specialized storytelling and clip-arranging role within an existing editing pipeline.



In most cases, I already write the script, record the voiceover, pre-select or chop down the footage, and often build the first 15 to 20 seconds of the video myself. Another tea
mber handles color grading and captioning.



Your role is to take the strongest pre-selected footage and arrange it into a compelling visual sequence that aligns with the voiceover and tells the story in the most engaging way possible.



This role is ideal for someone who is excellent at storytelling, pacing, visual rhythm, and choosing the best 
nts, not just someone who knows how to use editing software.



About the Role



You’ll be stepping in during the middle of the editing process and working with:



pre-chopped footage

voiceovers

examples of my editing style

sometimes an already-built intro or partial edit



From there, your job is to shape the footage into a strong 1-2 minute video that flows naturally, supports the voiceover, and uses only the strongest available shots in the most effective order.



You will not be responsible for:



scripting

building the concept from scratch

editing the full video from beginning to end

color grading

final captions



This is a per-project role that pays $35 USD per video. You can expect steady ongoing work, typically starting at around 3 videos per week. There is opportunity to take on more over time for someone who is reliable, efficient, and consistently does strong work.



My Ideal Editor



I’m looking for someone who:



- has strong editorial judgment



- knows how to make a video feel engaging and intentional



- can choose only the strongest shots, not just usable ones



- understands pacing, rhythm, and story flow



- can closely match my editing style



- is dependable and able to complete work on time



- is comfortable working within an existing team workflow



A lot of editors know how to cut clips together. I am specifically looking for someone who knows how to make a short-form video feel compelling!



Example Videos



You must feel confident that you can edit in my style:



Example 1: 



Example 2: 



Example 3: 



Key Responsibilities



- Arrange video clips to align with pre-recorded voiceovers



- Review pre-chopped footage and select the strongest 
nts



- Build engaging 1 to 2.5 minute videos that feel cohesive and visually compelling



- Maintain strong pacing and visual variety throughout the video



- Incorporate screen recordings, maps, and on-screen text when needed



- Match the style, rhythm, and structure of my existing content



- Collaborate via DaVinci for seamless project sharing and revisions



What I’m Looking For:



- Extensive short-form editing experience



- Strong storytelling ability



- Excellent shot selection and pacing instincts



- Proficiency in DaVinci



- Attention to detail



- Strong understanding of social media content



- Ability to closely replicate my editing style



- Reliability and consistency



What I Provide: 



- Scripts and voiceovers



- Pre-chopped or narrowed-down footage



- Clear creative direction



- Example videos and style references



- A team workflow where color grading and captioning are handled separately



How to Apply: 



1. Change the subject line to how many years of experience you have editing videos



2. IMPORTANT: Send links to 3 to 5 specific videos you personally edited that show you can create videos similar to my example videos. Please do not send talking-head videos.



3. Send your portfolio



4. Answer the following questions:



- How do the videos you linked demonstrate that you are a strong fit for this role?



- Why do you think you would do well editing travel and vlog-style content?



- What editing software do you use? And are you comfortable using DaVinci for collaboration?



- Do you feel confident editing 3 high-quality videos each week for $35 USD per video, with the opportunity to take on more over time if it is a strong fit?



- Do you have any additional experience that would make you a strong fit for this role?



- Are you open to doing a paid test task?



Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you!

title: Lead Shopify Developer & CRO Specialist (DTC E-Commerce Start-Ups)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and dedicated Shopify Developer to join our team long-term. You will be the lead developer responsible for building the digital storefronts from scratch for two brand-new physical products: Stubble Suede (a men's grooming product) and Rivrstone (a shower stone).



This role requires someone who can take a project from concept to launch and then transition into ongoing maintenance and aggressive conversion rate optimization (CRO). If you understand how to build pages that don’t just look good but actually convert, and you have the bandwidth to dive into exciting new brand launches, this role is for you.



(Note: We are looking to hire an independent freelancer to integrate into our team, not an agency).



Key Responsibilities:



New Store Development: Build out complete, highly optimized Shopify sites from the ground up for our two new DTC product lines.



Ongoing CRO & Split Testing: Once launched, rapidly develop, test, and iterate different landing pages, offers, and funnels to consistently improve conversion rates.



Performance Optimization: Ensure all pages are lightning-fast, fully responsive, and optimized for mobile traffic (mobile-first design is critical).



App Integration: Install, configure, and troubleshoot third-party Shopify apps and tracking pixels essential for marketing and analytics.



Collaboration: Work directly with the marketing side of the business to bring wireframes, copy, and creative assets to life.



Requirements & Qualifications:



Proven experience building and customizing Shopify themes (Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript).



Strong experience with popular Shopify page builders (e.g., Replo, PageFly, Shogun, or GemPages).



A solid understanding of e-commerce Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) best practices.



Experience setting up A/B tests, split testing landing pages, and utilizing heatmapping tools.



Fierce attention to detail, specifically regarding mobile responsiveness and page speed metrics.



Excellent English communication skills and the ability to work independently with minimal micromanagement.



Why Work With Us?



Ground-Floor Opportunity: You will be launching two brand-new products, giving you a major voice in how these sites are built, structured, and scaled.



Long-Term Stability: This is not a one-off build. We are looking for someone to grow with us to maintain and optimize the sites as the brands scale.



Flexible Working Environment: We care about results, fast iteration, and meeting deadlines, not tracking your mouse movements.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully):

To ensure you have read this entire post and are detail-oriented, please include the word "Launch" at the very beginning of your subject line or proposal message.



Please apply with the following:



Your Resume: An updated copy highlighting your Shopify experience.



Your Portfolio: Please provide links to only your top 2 or 3 best live Shopify stores or landing pages you have built. (Next to each link, you MUST write one sentence explaining exactly what your role was on that build—did you design it, code it, or both?)



Upwork / LinkedIn Profile: We highly value past client feedback. Please provide a link to your Upwork profile so we can read your reviews. (If you do not use Upwork, please provide your LinkedIn profile).



Screening Question: In 2 to 3 sentences, tell us what you believe is the #1 most common mistake brands make that hurts their mobile checkout conversion rates.



Logistics: What are your expected working hours/timezone availability, and what is your expected monthly (or hourly) salary?



[Highly Recommended] Loom Video: Record a quick 1-to-2 minute Loom video introducing yourself, sharing your screen, and walking us through one of the landing pages you built. Tell us why you designed it the way you did. (Applicants who include this will be moved to the top of our interview list).

title: Multimedia Specialist
description:
The ideal candidate will:

*Show competency in videography principles from scripting through final editing and show proficiency with branding guidelines using Adobe CS and video motion software such as Premier Pro, Motion, and/or After Effects, Premiere and Final Cut Pro in an Apple Mac environment.

*Pre-visualize and/or storyboard shot ideas based on scripts or project outlines.

*Perform non-linear editing using Final Cut or Adobe Premiere software and designs after effects as needed including motion graphics, layout, and animation

*Be able to select and use music to match the tone and style of the episode and story

*Be able to create various types of audio / video to tell stories across multiple platforms

*Be able to mix different media into a complete experience (video, graphics, music).

*Experience in typography, color, composition, compositing, key framing, and title design.

*Be detail-oriented and possess a sophisticated editing style

*Knowledge of social media and how to engage audiences on digital platforms in the public space is essential to this role

*Ability to work with a team directly in edit sessions to assess needs and meet project requirements.

*Properly maintain a digital archive

*Possess a strong attention to detail and time managements skills, and be an organized team player

*Have experience working in a fast-paced environment on weekly deadlines

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 45 wpm+)

*provide their own video and audio equipment



Job responsibilities include:

*Advise and coach the team on lighting, audio and video requirements to ensure quality footage for use in post-production

*Manage our podcast production schedule for Rosie Radio, including managing workflow; and capture, editing, and uploading of podcasts to various online channels (iTunes [Libsyn], YouTube, blog, etc)

*Play a highly collaborative creative role in structuring new ideas and managing production projects to completion

*Edit online content for YouTube and 
, including podcast episodes, storytelling videos, and how-to videos

*Create and produce marketing videos and PR videos, as needed

*Sourcing photos, stock video and audio as needed for projects

*Create all multimedia content for social (audio / video / design)

*Edit and upload footage and maintain video logs and media storage

*Create motion graphics for video

*Design online / social graphics for various projects



Qualifications

*Well-versed in Adobe Premiere, along with the rest of Adobe CC software (After Effects, Photoshop, etc)

*Experience creating media for social and the web

*Experience in storytelling via videography

*Knowledge of video codecs and encoding software

*Expertise with multicam editing

*A strong understanding of editing workflows and file structuring

*Ability to color correct and mix audio

*Knowledge and experience with video lighting and basic set setup



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Need to have professional editing software (Licensed Adobe Premiere)



Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 3PM - 7PM CST // Monday - Friday 5AM - 9AM PH Time



This is a PART-TIME role with a salary range of PHP28,000 -38,000 monthly,

description:

hourly, depending on experience

title: Telemarketeer
description:
Vacature: Nederlandstalige Telemarketeer (B2B Afsprakenmaker)



Hummingbirds is een groeiend digitaal marketingbureau dat werkt voor ambitieuze Vlaamse kmo's. Voor onze klanten zoeken we een enthousiaste telemarketeer die proactief afspraken boekt in een professionele B2B-omgeving.



Wat ga je doen?



Je werkt voor verschillende klanten van Hummingbirds. Per klant krijg je een lijst met bedrijven en contactpersonen, een duidelijke briefing over het bedrijf en een script als leidraad. Jouw taak is om telefonisch kwalitatieve afspraken te boeken zodat onze klanten zichzelf kunnen voorstellen bij potentiële nieuwe klanten. Je werkt je bellijst nauwgezet af, volgt openstaande contacten op en rapporteert elke geboekte afspraak correct in Basecamp.



Wie ben jij?



Je bent moedertaalspreker Nederlands met een vlekkeloos Belgisch-Nederlands accent. Je communiceert professioneel, vriendelijk en overtuigend aan de telefoon in een zakelijke context. Je bent hands-on, resultaatgericht en neemt verantwoordelijkheid voor je output zonder dat iemand erachteraan moet zitten. Je houdt oprecht van bellen, laat je niet afschrikken door een nee en gaat door tot de agenda gevuld is. Je rapporteert stipt en werkt gestructureerd met Basecamp als opvolgtool. Ervaring in telemarketing, koude acquisitie of afsprakenplanning in een B2B-omgeving is een pluspunt.



Wat bieden wij?



Een afwisselende rol waarbij je voor meerdere klanten en sectoren werkt. Duidelijke doelstellingen, een gestructureerde aanpak en een verloning gekoppeld aan prestaties.



Interesse?



Stuur je motivatie en cv met als onderwerp "Telemarketeer". Vertel ons hoeveel afspraken jij per week kan boeken.

title: Project Management
description:
Vacature: Nederlandstalige Digital Project Manager (Coördinator)



Hummingbirds is een groeiend digitaal marketingbureau gespecialiseerd in SEO, SEA, social media en performance marketing. We werken voor ambitieuze Vlaamse en Nederlandse kmo's en zoeken een ervaren projectmanager die het eerste aanspreekpunt wordt voor onze Nederlandstalige klanten.



Wat ga je doen?



Je beheert een pakket klantdossiers van A tot Z. Je verzamelt alle nodige informatie bij de klant via meetings, calls en dagelijkse communicatie, en vertaalt dat naar concrete opdrachten voor ons netwerk van freelancers. Je plaatst bestellingen, bewaakt deadlines, doet kwaliteitscontrole en koppelt terug naar de klant. Je stuurt ook onze telemarketeer aan waar nodig.



In de praktijk betekent dit: contentkalenders bespreken en goedkeuren voor social media, social media posts bestellen en nalezen, SEO-opdrachten uitzetten en controleren, SEA-rapporten opvolgen, e-mailmarketingcampagnes coördineren, PowerPoint-presentaties en grafisch werk bestellen bij de juiste freelancer, en analytics-inzichten doorgeven aan de juiste collega. Jij voert niets zelf uit, maar zorgt dat alles correct, op tijd en met de juiste kwaliteit wordt afgeleverd.



Wie ben jij?



Je bent moedertaalspreker Nederlands, vlekkeloos in woord en geschrift, en volledig op je gemak in professionele B2B-klantcontacten. Je hebt jarenlange ervaring in digital marketing en kent de werking van SEO, SEA, social media, e-mailmarketing en analytics van binnenuit, ook al voer je het niet zelf uit. Je weet wat een goede post is, wat een technische SEO-fout betekent, en wanneer een rapport niet klopt.



Je bent extreem proactief, denkt mee met de klant en wacht niet af. Je bent snel, gestructureerd en houdt meerdere dossiers tegelijk in de lucht zonder iets te laten vallen. Je werkt zelfstandig, neemt verantwoordelijkheid en houdt van een omgeving waar resultaat telt.



Wat bieden wij?



Een gevarieerde, zelfstandige rol in een snelgroeiend bureau met ambitieuze doelstellingen. Je werkt remote of hybride, met duidelijke systemen, een sterk freelancernetwerk en directe lijnen naar de juiste specialisten.



Interesse?



Stuur je motivatie en cv naar 
 met als onderwerp "Digital Project Manager". Vertel ons welke klantdossiers jij al succesvol hebt gecoördineerd en in welke disciplines je je het sterkst voelt.

title: (Full Time) SEO Web Auditor
description:
WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?: 



We need an experienced SEO Web Auditor to diagnose and resolve technical SEO issues efficiently. This role involves conducting in-depth website audits, identifying optimization opportunities, and implementing effective solutions to enhance website performance. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, delivers high-quality results on time, and follows SEO best practices. 



Basic web development skills are preferred to effectively implement technical SEO recommendations.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Conduct comprehensive website audits using web audit tools and Google Search Console to identify technical SEO issues.

2. Implement optimization strategies to achieve a website health score of 90% or higher.

3. Manage a set number of client websites, ensuring the timely completion of assigned monthly recurring tasks.

4. Perform technical SEO optimizations, including:



Fixing 3xx redirects

Resolving 4xx errors

Addressing 5xx server issues

Compressing and resizing images

Image file name optimization and adding or updating image alt text

Resolving duplicate content issues

Identifying and fixing schema markup issues

Handling other technical SEO tasks as required



5. Ensure all optimizations are executed with precision, quality, and timeliness.



Qualifications:



1. Can work 40 hours per week and produce quality work with minimum supervision

2. At least 2 years of relevant experience

3. Proven experience in SEO and technical SEO optimization.

4. Familiarity with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as they relate to SEO.

5. Ability to communicate complex SEO concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

6. A proactive, results-driven mindset.

7. Preferably has experience with e-commerce or large-scale website audits.

8. Familiarity with CMS platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, BigCommerce, Magento, or others.



HOW TO APPLY:



Apply here:
