title: Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist
description:
Overview



We are hiring a highly skilled, independent, fast-moving Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist to drive growth for iSpeax Therapy and iSpeax Tech.



This is not a content posting role.

You will be responsible for strategy, execution, performance tracking, and continuous optimization.



You must:



Set clear daily/weekly growth goals

Execute quickly

Analyze results

Improve performance consistently



This role starts part-time (4 hrs/day) with potential to expand to full-time (8 hrs/day).



The Role



Own and execute marketing across:



Content

SEO

Website (Webflow)

Social media

 marketing

Lead generation

AI-assisted production



Key Responsibilities



1. Growth Strategy & Execution:



Set and track KPIs (followers, engagement, traffic, leads, conversions)

Build and execute growth strategies

Create monthly plans aligned with campaigns and business goals

Analyze performance and optimize based on data



2. Content Creation & Publishing:



Create, edit, and publish content (social, blog, website,
)

Write SEO-optimized blog articles

Publish and format content in Webflow

Repurpose long-form into short-form (reels, captions,
s, landing pages)

Maintain content calendar

Ensure all content is high-quality and on-brand

Support basic video editing

Use AI tools to increase speed and efficiency



3. SEO & Website Optimization:



Conduct keyword, topic, and competitor research

Optimize blogs, pages, metadata, internal links, and CTAs

Improve organic traffic and search visibility

Support landing page optimization for conversions

Monitor and improve SEO performance



4. Social Media Growth:



Manage and grow Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms

Focus on weekly follower growth

Develop platform-specific strategies

Research hashtags and trends

Engage with audience (comments, DMs, stories)

Test hooks, formats, and posting strategies



5.
 Marketing & Campaigns:



Manage and grow
 lists

Create newsletters, nurture flows, and campaigns

Use Mailchimp (or similar)

Build lead magnets

Track opens, clicks, and conversions



6. CRM, Tracking & Reporting:



Track leads and sources

Maintain CRM or tracking systems

Provide weekly/monthly reports on:

Social growth

SEO

Traffic

 performance

Lead generation

Turn data into actionable insights



Hard Requirements (Apply Only If You Meet These):



Strong experience in growth marketing, SEO, content,
, and social

Strong writing skills (blogs,
s, landing pages)

Strong SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page optimization)

Experience with Webflow publishing

Experience with Instagram & TikTok growth

Experience with Mailchimp (or similar)

Proficiency in tools (Airtable, Webflow, ChatGPT, Google Cloud, Canva, etc.)

Experience with content calendars, video editing, and lead magnets

Experience with CRM or lead tracking

Able to work independently and quickly

Strong problem-solving and attention to detail

Stable internet + comfortable on Zoom



Bonus:



Healthcare/therapy/education / SaaS experience

Short-form video content experience

Strong visual/branding skills

Experience building AI workflows



Not a Fit If:



You only post content (no growth focus)

You need constant direction

You don’t track KPIs or performance

You lack real SEO knowledge

You work slowly or sacrifice quality

You avoid ownership or accountability



How You’ll Work



Work directly with founders

Own execution and results

Set, track, and evaluate growth goals

Collaborate regularly via Zoom



We value: speed, quality, results, and accountability



Schedule



Start: 4 hours/day; Potential: 8 hours/day

Opportunity to grow into a larger role



Performance Metrics:



Follower growth

Engagement

Blog publishing consistency

SEO performance

Website traffic

 list growth

Lead generation

Campaign quality

Speed and efficiency

Reporting quality

Ability to optimize performance over time



Ideal Candidate:



Proactive, strategic, fast, and execution-focused.

You take ownership, move quickly, and improve results continuously.



You are not just creative — you are accountable for growth.

You should be able to take a goal, build a plan, execute, measure, and improve without constant direction.





How to Apply:



Important: First sentence must include the word “essential.”



Submit:



2 writing samples (1 blog + 1
)

2 social content samples + 1 short-form video

1 results example (goal, actions, outcome)

List of tools used + proficiency level

Internet speed test screenshot

Brief note on personal interests

title: Customer Support + Social Media Manager (30 Years+)
description:
We’re a fast-growing ecommerce supplement brand (launched 2 weeks ago) and scaling quickly. That means a lot of customer messages, comments, and orders — and we need someone who can handle it like a pro.



Understanding of refund prevention & retention tactics is essential for this role. Also if you not over 30 years, please ignore this.

This is not a chill support role — we need someone sharp, fast, and reliable.



What You’ll Do

-Handle customer
s daily via Commslayer

-Manage Shopify backend (cancel orders, edit orders, refunds, subscriptions, etc.)

-Reply to social media comments & DMs (and hide/remove inappropriate ones)

-Communicate with our supplier via WhatsApp (order issues, updates, etc.)

-Keep everything organized, clean, and under control



Requirements

-MUST know Commslayer

-MUST understand AI tools deeply (ChatGPT, automation, etc.)

-Strong Shopify experience (this is critical)

-Fluent, natural English (native-level writing)

-Extremely reliable & responsive

-Available Monday–Sunday (daily work required)

-Able to handle high volume without getting overwhelmed

-Understanding of refund prevention & retention tactics





Important – Application Requirement



Do NOT start your application with “Hi” or a generic intro.



Instead, introduce yourself by replying to this customer
:



:



"Hello, I just received my order and honestly I don’t think this product is for me. I was expecting faster results and I’d like to return it and get a refund. Please let me know how to proceed."



Your reply should show:



How you handle potential refunds

Your ability to retain the customer

Your tone (friendly, calm, professional)



Applications without this will be ignored.



Your Time will be tracked in TimeDoctor where we can see if you actually working or browsing on other websites.



We’re growing fast.
s will increase quickly.

If you can’t handle pressure or volume, this is not for you.

title: Client Coach and Feedback Specialist – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
We are a growing Australian business looking for a proactive Marketing Assistant to support
 marketing, brand content, and e-commerce execution.

This is a contract role working directly with the Marketing team. You will take ownership of key marketing tasks and help drive day-to-day output.



Key Responsibilities



 Marketing (Klaviyo)

• Set up and manage campaigns and flows

• Monitor and optimise existing flows

• Manage lists and segments

• Write and schedule
 campaigns



Content & Blog Writing

• Write blog content with SEO in mind

• Support landing page and campaign copy

• Ensure content is structured and optimised



Shopify & E-commerce

• Make updates to Shopify (products, pages, content)

• Create and manage product listings (Shopify, Amazon, other platforms)



General Support

• Create simple assets in Canva

• Manage Google Drive and organise files

• Conduct online research and support ad hoc tasks



Requirements (Must Have)

• Experience with Klaviyo

• Strong copywriting skills

• Experience with Shopify

• Experience with product listings (Shopify, Amazon or similar)

• Experience with Canva

• Strong attention to detail and organisation

• Experience with AI platforms – Chat GPT and Claude.



Does this sound like you?

• Proactive and take ownership

• Have strong common sense and problem-solving ability

• Are reliable and responsive

• Can work independently



Role Details

• Full-time (8 hours per day)

• Must work closely aligned with AEST hours



To Apply

Start your application with:

“Marketing Specialist”



Then include:

• Your experience with Klaviyo

• Your experience with copywriting

• Your experience with Shopify

• Platforms you’ve listed products on

• Confirmation you can work AEST hours

Please include links to your resume and portfolio if applicable.

title: AI Content & Video Virtual Assistant (WordPress, YouTube, Social Media, SEO)
description:
We are looking for a versatile VA who can operate AI tools to create videos, landing pages, blog posts, and social media content. No creative editing or writing required — you will follow SOPs and use our AI tools for all production.



Responsibilities:

•     Generate scripts using AI

•     Create videos using AI video tools

•     Upload and optimize videos using AI app

•     Create landing pages and blog posts using AI

•     Publish content in WordPress

•     Repurpose content for social media using AI

•     Follow detailed SOPs for every task



NOTE: For this job, just communicate at the
 address listed below. DO NOT post any messages here on OnlineJobs



We will train you but if you do have any experience include that in the recording you provide by answering the following questions:



1.     What AI tools have you used for content or video?

2.     Have you published content in WordPress?

3.     Have you published content on YouTube or other video platforms?

4.     Can you follow detailed SOPs without improvising?

5.     Are you comfortable doing both video and website tasks?



For the Wordpress website, the duties would be posting articles generated by our AI article generator on Wordpress with AI images generated by our AI programs. Plus using the AI to generate content for the homepage and other money pages on the website.  



For YouTube channel, the duties would include creating YouTube scripts with our AI writer and uploading those AI generated video scripts into our AI video program to create videos and then uploading videos generated by our AI program onto YouTube as well repurposing those videos into shorts with our AI app to post on TikTok, Instagram, etc.



NOTE: For this job, just communicate at this
 address stellarjobopenings at gmail dot com .



NOTE: Use Vocaroo dot com for voice recording. Go to SpeedTest dot net and send me a screenshot of your internet speed.



Please send the internet speed test screenshot and VOICE RECORDING link with info about yourself, past work experience with any of the things listed above & why you think you would be a good fit for this position (i.e. why should we hire you?). Plus if you have a resume, send that as well.



Let me know if you are available part time, full time or either. Please send VOICE RECORDING telling us about yourself, past work experience any of things listed above to this
 stellarjobopenings at gmail dot com with the subject line "Wordpress/YouTube Applicant" and then after that list either "Full Time" or list "Part Time" or list "Available PT/FT (if you are available for either full time or part time) in the subject line.



After we listen to your recording, if it's a good fit, we will contact you to setup an interview.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Appointment setter — cold outreach (web design sales)

English fluency required · Proven track record required



We're looking for a confident, clear-spoken appointment setter to help us connect with small businesses that need a website — or need theirs upgraded. Your job is simple: reach out, spark interest, and book a call. We handle everything after that.



What you'll be doing

-Cold calling businesses from a provided lead list to introduce our web design services



-Cold DM outreach on Instagram to business owners who have no website or an outdated one



-Booking qualified appointments for our sales/closing call



-Following up with leads and keeping a simple tracker of outreach activity



What we're looking for

-Excellent spoken English — clear accent, confident delivery, easy to understand over a phone call



-Proven track record — previous experience in appointment setting, cold calling, or sales outreach with results you can share



-Comfortable with rejection — resilient, consistent, and self-motivated



-Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment for calls



What we provide

-A ready-to-use lead list — no prospecting needed on your end



-Full training on the pitch, the offer, and how we handle objections



-Clear understanding of the mission and what we're building — you'll feel good about what you're selling



-A straightforward, no-fluff working relationship with fast communication



*Important: Please include a short voice recording (even a voice note) introducing yourself when you apply. This is the fastest way to move forward. Applications without one may not be reviewed.



*Qualified lead: prospect agrees to a call/meeting and shows up" rather than just "agrees on the phone."

title: Virtual Assistant for Folly
description:
WHO WE ARE



We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS



- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- Customer Support: Help musicians, athletes, celebrities, and top executives on chat,
, and phones with easy, low stress questions like booking rooms or general info about their stay.

- Sales & Follow-Up (Warm Leads): No cold calling! We only reach out to guests who’ve shown interest—like those who canceled a booking—to find out what happened. We also check in with past guests to share new locations and help plan their next stay.

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



To apply: 



See the vibe:

description:
WHO WE ARE

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- Follow-Up with Warm Leads: Talk to guests who already showed interest—like people who canceled a booking or stayed with us before. You’ll reach out by phone or
 to see how we can help, share new spots they might like, and help them plan their next stay. No cold calling, ever!

- AI Assistance: We use AI to identify users who either abandoned their cart during checkout or are no longer actively staying with us. The AI calls these users to see if they need help completing their booking. If they do, we connect them with you to finalize their reservation.

- Subscription: We offer a subscription plan that gives guests access to all of our locations. When someone calls to cancel, your job is to explain the benefits and value of staying subscribed, and help them make the most of their membership.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

title: Short Form Video Clipper for Horror YouTube Channel
description:
Hi I'm Kat! I run a YouTube channel called Kat Watches Horror Movies (117k subscribers) where I watch scary films and scream my way through them. I'm looking to hire 2–3 dedicated clippers to take my long-form YouTube videos and turn them into short, punchy, scroll-stopping clips for YouTube shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and X.



Your Role:

- Watch my YouTube videos (full reactions are usually 30–50 min) and find the BEST 
nts-- big scares, funny reactions, dramatic commentary, chaotic energy, then edit them into 30–90 second vertical reels (9:16 format) with captions and clean cuts.

- Deliver 5–10 clips per week, ready to post 

- Match the vibe of my channel, lots of clips already up on YouTube so you can get a sense. 



Looking for someone who:

- Is experienced with short-form video editing. 

- Is great at adding captions (accurate, readable)

- Understands what makes a clip go viral (pacing, hooks, the right 
nt to cut)

- Reliable and communicative!

- Can turn out 5-10 videos per week



NO AI CLIPPING! THAT'S WHY I'M HERE! I already have Opus AI and have tried a bunch of AI platforms already. At this point I can spot an AI clip a mile away!



MAJOR BONUS POINTS if you like/understand horror content, and you're funny!!



Please include the following in your application:

- Tell me your editing experience, and whether you've worked with creators before.

- 2–3 examples of short-form clips you've made (Send links! If you have a portfolio, or an account you've worked on, send it! Do you work on your own Instagram or YouTube? Send it!)



I'll be hiring 2–3 people from this posting! Excited to see your portfolios! Hoping to start ASAP!



Channel for reference:

title: Wholesale Outreach & Account Manager — eCommerce
description:
We are a fast-growing eCommerce brand in the novelty gift niche with over 614,000 followers across social media platforms. Our products go viral regularly and we are now expanding into wholesale — selling directly to smoke shops, gift shops, boutiques, and novelty retailers.

We are looking for a motivated Wholesale Outreach & Account Manager to own and grow this entire branch of the business independently. This is a performance-driven role with significant earning potential through commission on every account you open and every order you generate.

What you will own completely:



Researching and identifying wholesale prospects — smoke shops, gift shops, boutiques, novelty stores, and similar retailers across the US and internationally

Sending outreach
s daily using our provided
 templates and wholesale catalog

Following up with interested prospects through the full conversation until they are ready to place an order

Managing ongoing relationships with existing wholesale accounts — checking in, sending reorder reminders, and upselling new products as we launch them

Keeping a clean Google Sheet tracking all prospects, outreach status, replies, and order history

Sending a daily summary report of activity and results

Handling all wholesale communication and correspondence



What the owner handles:



Confirming and processing client orders

Handling payments

Approving new product launches



This role is perfect for someone who:



Has experience in sales, outreach, or account management

Is highly organised and self-directed — you will manage your own pipeline

Is comfortable sending 25-30 outreach
s per day

Wants to build something — this role has room to grow into a full wholesale manager position as the channel scales



We are a legitimate, established brand with viral social proof, a professional wholesale catalog, and products with strong market demand. You will have everything you need to succeed from day one.



WAGE / SALARY

$25/week base + commission — OTE $200-$500+/week for strong performers

Here is the exact commission breakdown to paste in or explain if asked:



8% commission on the first order from every new account you open — a new account placing a $400 opening order pays you $32 on that single order

3% commission on all reorders from accounts you manage — a reorder of $400 pays you $12, and accounts reorder every 4-6 weeks, meaning every account you open keeps paying you passively

$50 bonus for every 5 new accounts opened in a calendar month — open 10 accounts in a month and you earn an extra $100 on top of all commissions



Example realistic monthly earnings at moderate performance:



Base: $100/month (4 weeks at $25)

10 new accounts at avg $350 opening order: $280 in 8% commission

8 existing accounts reordering at avg $350: $84 in 3% commission

1 bonus for 5+ accounts: $50

Total: approximately $514/month for a part-time role at 25-30
s per day



Example earnings at strong performance:



Base: $100

20 new accounts at avg $400: $640 in 8% commission

15 reorders at avg $400: $180 in 3% commission

2 bonuses: $100

Total: approximately $1,020/month



The commission structure rewards both opening new accounts and building a recurring book of business. The more accounts accumulated over time the more the 3% reorder commission compounds passively.



DESIRED HOURS PER WEEK

15-20 hours



BUSINESS OR CONTACT NAME

Magicalverse

title: Care Coordinator | Wound Care
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and clinically aware Care Coordinator to support a physician-led mobile wound care team. This role is responsible for coordinating patient care across the continuum, ensuring timely follow-up, optimizing communication between providers and referral sources, and supporting outcomes-driven wound management.



This is a fast-paced, high-responsibility role ideal for someone who thrives in clinical operations and understands the importance of precision, compliance, and patient-centered care.





Key Responsibilities

 • Coordinate patient scheduling, follow-ups, and visit optimization for mobile wound care providers

 • Serve as the primary liaison between patients, caregivers, providers, home health agencies, SNFs, and referral sources

 • Track wound care plans, ensuring adherence to treatment frequency, orders, and documentation timelines

 • Monitor incoming referrals, verify patient information, and facilitate timely onboarding

 • Ensure all required documentation (orders, progress notes, photos, consents) is complete and audit-ready

 • Assist in care plan implementation including coordination of supplies, DME (e.g., wound vac), and specialty treatments

 • Proactively identify delays in care, missed visits, or barriers (transportation, SDOH issues) and escalate appropriately

 • Support quality assurance efforts by tracking outcomes, readmissions, and care gaps

 • Maintain HIPAA compliance and ensure all communication meets regulatory standards





Qualifications

 • Experience in healthcare coordination, case management, home health, or wound care preferred

 • Strong understanding of clinical workflows (SNF, home health, or outpatient settings)

 • Excellent organizational skills with ability to manage multiple patients and priorities simultaneously

 • Strong communication skills—must be able to speak confidently with providers, nurses, and administrators

 • Familiarity with EMR systems and documentation standards

 • Knowledge of Medicare guidelines and documentation compliance is a strong plus

 • Detail-oriented with a proactive, problem-solving mindset



Preferred (but not required)

 • Experience in wound care, post-acute care, or care transitions

 • Understanding of insurance verification and authorization processes

title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Negotiable for extensive experience).

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to

 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.



How to Apply (Follow Precisely):

Failure to follow these instructions will result in immediate disqualification.

: 

Subject Line: [Guest Support Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Attachments: Updated Resume + A Dropbox/Drive link to a 60-second audio intro explaining your specific experience in property management operations.

Compliance Test: At the end of your
, please answer this: Who is the current Prime Minister of London?

title: Client Success and Coaching Manager – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) - Outbound
description:
Who We Are: Anchor Integration is a software development agency helping businesses streamline operations through custom-built technology. We're scaling outreach and need a sharp, self-driven SDR to open doors.



The Role: Cold calls. Cold
s. Booked meetings. That's the job.

You know how to get someone's attention in the first 10 seconds. You handle objections without sounding robotic. You turn "not interested" into a conversation and a booked call.

What You'll Do:

-Execute outbound cold calls and
 campaigns to targeted leads

-Qualify prospects and handle objections naturally

-Book discovery calls directly on the founder's calendar

-Track outreach activity and results consistently

You're the Right Fit If You:

-Have proven outbound SDR experience — cold calling and cold
ing specifically

-Can open a cold call that doesn't get hung up on immediately

-Are fully self-managed in a remote setup

-Have B2B, tech, or agency sales experience (strong plus)

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English

Pay:

-$5–$8/hr (based on experience)

-Commission on booked calls and closed deals



To Apply: Subject line: "Outbound SDR Application – [Your Name]"

Answer all three or your application won't be reviewed:



Brief summary of your outbound SDR experience

 1. Brief summary of your outbound SDR experience

 2.  Your average daily call volume and typical booking rate

 3.  A lead says "I'm not interested" on a cold call, write out exactly how you'd handle it

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter – $2,000–$4,000/month
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Mon–Fri, day shift



ABOUT US



Young Publisher | 



- We’re an international digital publishing company

- We’ve been hiring Filipinos for over 5 years

- We offer long-term roles

- We don't disappear, we pay on time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced Direct-Response Copywriter who can:



- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create stop-scrolling ads

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act



This is a full-time role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



BENEFITS



- Get direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter: a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



ROLE SUMMARY



- Full-time (Mon–Fri, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000 – $4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of direct-response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



HIRING PROCESS



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) — Inbound
description:
Who We Are: Anchor Integration is a software development agency helping businesses solve operational problems through custom technology. Our founder is running ads and publishing content that's already pulling in warm, hand-raising leads. We need someone to convert that interest into booked discovery calls.



The Role: One metric. One job. Book discovery calls.

You'll be working warm inbound leads: people who watched the video, filled out the form, and raised their hand. Your job is to reach out fast, connect genuinely, handle hesitation, and get them on the founder's calendar.

What You'll Do:

-Follow up with inbound leads from
 ads and video funnels

-Call and
 quickly with speed to lead is everything here

-Qualify leads and handle objections naturally

-Book discovery calls directly on the founder's calendar

-Keep your pipeline organized without being asked

You're the Right Fit If You:

-Have real SDR experience (calls made,
s sent, meetings booked)

-Can open a warm call without sounding scripted

-Handle objections in real time without losing the thread

-Are self-managed (you don't need daily check-ins)

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English

Pay:

-$5–$8/hr (based on experience)

-Commission on booked calls and closed deals



To Apply Subject line: "Inbound SDR Application – [Your Name]"

Answer all three or your application won't be reviewed:



 1. Brief summary of your SDR or sales experience

 2.  How fast do you typically follow up with a new inbound lead and why does that timing matter to you?

 3.  A lead says "I'm still not sure if this is for me" - write out exactly how you'd respond

title: Short-Form Video Editor - Music Industry & Events Management Content
description:
We're a growing content brand producing daily short-form video content across Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn. We run two accounts, one focused on music industry content and one on events management content, and we're looking for a skilled, reliable video editor to join our team on a part-time basis.



You'll be editing 2-3 short-form videos per day for each account (4-6 videos total daily). We provide the raw footage and full scripts with editing guidance. Your job is to turn them into scroll-stopping, polished videos that retain viewers and drive engagement.



Pay: $6-8 USD/hour (20 hours per week), depending on experience and portfolio quality.



What You'll Be Doing



Edit 2-3 short-form videos per day for each account (4-6 videos total daily, under 90 seconds each) across music industry and events management

Add captions/subtitles, text overlays, transitions, and sound effects using CapCut

Follow our scripts and editing notes to match the pacing, hooks, and retention beats we've mapped out

Format and export videos optimised for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

Schedule all finished videos via our two Buffer accounts (we'll provide access and posting schedules)

Maintain a consistent visual style and brand identity across both accounts

Deliver edits on time with a reliable daily turnaround

Communicate proactively: flag issues, ask questions, suggest improvements



What We Provide



Raw filmed footage (talking head / on-camera content)

Detailed scripts with hook structure, beat-by-beat pacing, and editing cues

Brand guidelines and visual references

Access to our two Buffer accounts with posting schedules

Clear feedback and a collaborative working relationship



Requirements



Proficient in CapCut (this is our primary editing tool and you must be confident with it)

Experience editing short-form vertical video (Reels/TikTok/Shorts format)

Strong sense of pacing and retention: you understand what keeps people watching

Ability to add clean captions, text animations, and on-screen elements

Experience with colour grading talking-head footage

Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer)

Reliable internet connection and the ability to deliver 4-6 videos per day consistently

Strong English communication skills (written)





Bonus (Not Required)



Basic motion graphics or animation skills





How to Apply

Please include in your application:



Start your application with the word "CAPCUT" so we know you've read the full post

A brief introduction about yourself and your editing experience

Links to 2-3 examples of short-form videos you've edited (Reels, TikToks, or Shorts)

Confirm you are proficient in CapCut Pro

Your availability (hours per day and timezone)

Your expected hourly rate in USD



Please do NOT send a generic application. We read every application and want to hear why you'd be a great fit for this specific role.

We're looking to hire quickly and start with a paid trial period. If you're fast, reliable, and love making content that people can't scroll past, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Advanced Title Research Specialist – Curative Title / Distressed Title Investing
description:
We are hiring for a very specific real estate research role.

-This is not a general real estate position.

-This is not a basic admin role.

-This is not for people who only know comps, cold calling, skip tracing, or pulling owner lists.



We are looking for someone with real experience in title research, land records, ownership analysis, and messy title situations.



Our niche is distressed title investing. We look for properties where ownership, authority, or chain of title problems create opportunity. The work is investigative. You must know how to follow the story of a property through deeds, liens, court filings, probate issues, tax records, and ownership mismatches. This is not clerical work.



You will be researching properties primarily in Virginia, and you will be given access to our private paid account at 
. You must already be comfortable using land records systems to search by name, date, instrument number, instrument type, book/page, description, and tax number, and then reviewing the indexed records and document images.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands how to identify and work through situations such as:



Probates with no executor’s deed recorded

Affidavits of heirship with no follow-up conveyance

Divorce decrees with no deed transfer

Old judgments clouding title

IRS liens tied to long-term holds

Lis pendens that went quiet

Deeds of trust with no recorded release

Ownership mismatches between tax records and recorded chain

Living trust mismatches between the tax appraiser and the recorded chain of title



You should already understand why these situations matter, how they affect authority to convey, and how they can create either risk or opportunity. A major part of this role is confirming who actually owns the property, who has authority, what defects exist, and whether the deal is worth pursuing at all. That mindset is central to how we operate.



Our goal is not to chase clean retail deals.

Our goal is to find messy title deals, consolidate and cure title where possible, and create value from situations other people ignore. That includes tracking heirs, identifying missing transfers, locating breaks in title, finding unresolved encumbrances, and helping us understand the cleanest path forward.



You should be comfortable with work such as:



Reviewing deeds and vesting

Tracing chain of title

Identifying whether title is held by individuals, heirs, trusts, estates, LLCs, or co-owners

Spotting unreleased deeds of trust, judgments, and clouds on title

Researching probate status and whether legal authority exists

Comparing tax records to recorded title

Researching heirs through obituaries, probate filings, family relationships, and related records

Using investigative judgment to determine whether a problem is fatal, curable, or worth pursuing



You should also understand concepts such as:



Chain of title

Vesting

Tenants in common vs. joint tenancy

Probate authority

Heirship

Lien priority

Unreleased liens or deeds of trust

Clouds on title

Why the tax bill name is not always the legal owner



These are foundational to this role, not things we are looking to teach from the beginning.



Tools and research experience that would be highly relevant include land records systems, tax assessor records, court records, probate searches, property data tools, obituary research, and heir research. Experience with investigative property research is a major plus.



This role is for someone who can think critically and independently. We are not looking for someone who applies to every real estate job just because they want work. We are looking for someone who already understands this niche or is close enough to it that they can immediately recognize what we are talking about without needing basic training.



Do not apply if:

-You have never done real title research

-You do not know how to read deeds and follow ownership

-You need to be taught what probate authority means

-You have only done acquisitions, cold calling, or lead generation

-You are applying because the word “real estate” was in the post



As part of getting familiar with our niche, the person we hire will also be expected to join these two
 groups so they can better understand the type of investing we do:









This niche is different from the kind of real estate work many people are used to, so we want someone who can quickly get aligned with how we look at title problems and opportunities.



***To apply, message us on WhatsApp and begin your message with:

"Title Expert"

Then briefly explain your experience with title research and give one real example of a messy title issue you have identified or worked on.

WhatsApp number:

+1(443) seven, zero, two-six, one, zero, nine



If you cannot follow those instructions exactly, do not apply.

This is a specialized role for someone who knows how to investigate ownership, defects, and authority at a high level.

title: Quantity Surveyor
description:
Virtual Quantity Surveyor (Remote – Philippines Based)



Support a growing New Zealand painting and decorating business



About Us

Finesse Painting & Decorating Ltd is a well-established and fast-growing painting company based in New Zealand. We deliver high-quality commercial, residential, and maintenance painting services, with a strong reputation for professionalism, reliability, and excellent client service.

As we continue to grow across New Zealand, we are looking for a highly organised, detail-focused Virtual Quantity Surveyor based in the Philippines to join our remote support team.

This role will work closely alongside our in-house New Zealand-based Quantity Surveyor, helping to prepare accurate estimates, review plans, and support the pricing process across a range of projects.



About the Role

As our Virtual Quantity Surveyor, you will play an important support role in our estimating and pricing workflow. You will be responsible for reviewing plans and documentation, completing take-offs, and assisting with the preparation of accurate cost estimates for painting and decorating projects.

You will work directly with our in-house QS in New Zealand, as well as our wider operations and admin team, to help ensure tenders and quotes are completed accurately and on time.



Key Responsibilities

Review architectural drawings, specifications, and tender documents

Complete quantity take-offs from plans provided

Assist in preparing accurate cost estimates and pricing schedules

Support the in-house QS with tender submissions and quote preparation

Help build detailed job budgets and scope summaries

Liaise with internal tea
mbers to clarify scope and pricing requirements

Ensure estimates are completed in line with company standards and deadlines

Maintain organised records of estimates, take-offs, and supporting documents



What We’re Looking For

Bachelor’s degree in Quantity Surveying, Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or similar

2+ years’ experience in quantity surveying, estimating, or take-offs preferred

Strong ability to read and interpret construction drawings and specifications

Excellent attention to detail and high level of accuracy

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to work independently while also collaborating closely with a remote team

Reliable internet connection and suitable home office setup

Strong time management and ability to meet deadlines



Preferred / Advantageous

Experience in painting, construction, fit-out, or maintenance estimating

Familiarity with New Zealand or Australian construction terminology

Experience using take-off / estimating software such as CostX, PlanSwift, Bluebeam, or similar

Experience using Excel for pricing and cost breakdowns

Please note: Access to your own take-off / estimating software is preferred.



What We Offer

Competitive salary (based on experience)

Long-term remote role with a growing New Zealand company

Flexible work-from-home environment

Supportive team culture with clear systems and processes

Opportunity to grow with a business expanding nationally

Direct mentoring and collaboration with our experienced in-house QS



How to Apply

If this sounds like the right fit for you, please send your CV and a short cover letter to 
 with the subject line:

Application – Virtual Quantity Surveyor



In your application, please also include:

What estimating / take-off software you currently use

Your experience with construction or painting-related estimating

Your expected hourly salary

title: New Patient Healthcare Growth & Digital Execution Coordinator
description:
Journey Psyche is a fast-growing U.S. psychiatry company operating across multiple states, with a strong focus on high-quality medication management, new patient access, and operational excellence.



We are currently active in California, Arizona, Washington, Missouri, and additional expanding markets, and we are continuing to grow quickly. We are also bringing another company on board in June/July, which will significantly expand our reach and provider base.



This is a fast-paced, high-growth environment. We are not a small static practice — we are building a serious multi-state mental health company with strong systems, strong execution, and long-term vision.



This is a career position, not a short-term freelance role.



Position Overview



We are hiring a New Patient Growth & Digital Execution Coordinator to help us expand provider visibility, maintain directory and website accuracy, support referral outreach, and coordinate digital execution as we scale.



This is not a strategy-only role and not just a “marketing assistant” position.



This is an execution-heavy growth role for someone who can move quickly, follow direction, stay organized, and help us maintain 
ntum across many channels.



Core Mission



Your role is to help us grow new patient flow by making sure our providers are:

 • visible

 • accurate

 • bookable

 • properly represented across digital platforms

 • supported by consistent outreach and referral execution



What You’ll Be Working On



1. Directory Setup & Maintenance



Build and maintain provider and practice profiles on platforms such as:

 • Zocdoc

 • Psychology Today

 • Zencare

 • Doximity

 • Healthgrades

 • Vitals

 • WebMD Care

 • Google Business / related listings

 • Additional directories as assigned



Tasks include:

 • Creating new provider profiles

 • Updating specialties, bios, and insurance information

 • Uploading photos/videos

 • Maintaining consistency across all sites

 • Checking links and booking accuracy

 • Keeping providers visible in all active markets



2. Website & Location Execution



You will help support our ongoing growth by working with our website developer and internal team to keep everything updated.



This includes:

 • provider page updates

 • location page updates

 • city-specific pages

 • booking links

 • service descriptions

 • insurance messaging

 • cross-linking support between provider listings and website pages



3. Referral & Outreach Coordination



This role will also support our referral outreach engine.



That includes:

 • helping set up and organize referral
 systems

 • coordinating provider referral lists

 • supporting outreach campaigns to referral sources

 • making sure outreach materials are updated and ready

 • helping keep referral communication consistent as we grow



This is a major part of the role and will become more important over time.



4. Digital Growth Coordination



You will work closely with our digital team and outside partners.



This may include coordination with:

 • our website developer

 • our Google Ads / advertising support

 • our head of digital media

 • our automation team working on marketing tools and workflows



You do not need to be the top strategist in all of these areas, but you must be able to help coordinate, update, execute, and keep things moving.



5. YouTube /
 Content Distribution Support



We create direction internally. You help execute.



This may include:

 • uploading YouTube videos

 • entering captions and descriptions

 • updating profile content

 • posting or updating basic materials across digital platforms



There will be some content creation role here using Canva and other tools . It is heavy on an execution role.



6. Daily Visibility & Growth Checks



You will regularly help check:

 • Are providers live?

 • Are listings accurate?

 • Are links working?

 • Are insurance plans correct?

 • Are city pages updated?

 • Are referral materials current?

 • Are digital growth tasks moving?



Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:

 • follows instructions very well

 • can move quickly

 • can copy, paste, build, update, and maintain systems

 • is comfortable doing repetitive execution work

 • likes structure

 • can work across multiple platforms without getting overwhelmed

 • can coordinate with multiple people and keep work moving



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is not ideal for someone who:

 • wants to only brainstorm strategy

 • gets bored with execution work

 • needs constant supervision to finish tasks

 • prefers slow-paced or low-pressure environments

 • struggles to stay organized across many moving parts



Why This Role Matters



We are in a growth phase where provider visibility directly impacts revenue, schedule fill, and patient access.



When this role is done well:

 • more providers are bookable

 • more markets are visible

 • more referrals come in

 • our growth channels stay active

 • leadership is not pulled in 10 directions



This role will become more valuable as the company grows.



What Success Looks Like



Success in this role means:

 • providers launched faster

 • directories updated correctly

 • new locations supported quickly

 • referral outreach organized

 • digital execution moving without constant reminders

 • fewer gaps, fewer broken links, fewer delays

 • stronger support for new patient growth



Experience That Helps



Helpful experience includes: EHR Experience Tebra, Simple Practice, Practice Fusion 

 • healthcare directories

 • provider profile setup

 • Zocdoc

 • Psychology Today

 • Zencare

 • Doximity

 • Google Business Profile

 • website update coordination

 • YouTube uploads

 • digital marketing support

 • referral/outreach coordination

 • working with checklists and repeatable systems



Work Environment

 • Fast-paced

 • High-growth

 • Multi-state

 • Execution-focused

 • Long-term opportunity



This is a role for someone who wants to grow with a company and take pride in helping build something real.



Schedule

 • Full-time preferred

 • Must be reliable

 • Must communicate clearly

 • Must overlap at least partially with U.S. business hours but can be on PH time 



?



To Apply (Required)



At the top of your application, write:



GROWTH EXECUTION



Then answer these questions:

 1. If I give you one completed provider profile and ask you to replicate it across 5 different websites, how would you do it?

 2. Which platforms have you worked with before? (Zocdoc, Psychology Today, Zencare, Doximity, Healthgrades, Vitals, Google Business Profile, website editors, YouTube)

 3. Are you comfortable with repetitive but important execution work?

 4. Have you ever worked in a fast-paced company with many moving parts?

 5. Send one example of work where you followed detailed instructions accurately.



?



Final Note



We are building something serious.



This is a long-term position inside a growing company, and the right person will play an important role in helping us scale across markets and support new patient growth.



If you are fast, reliable, organized, and strong at execution, this could be a great fit.



Starting rate: $6.50–$7.00/hour (based on experience)

 • Performance-based increases as you grow in the role

title: AI UGC & Product Video Creator for Meta Ads
description:
AI Video Ad Creator — Ecommerce Brand (Meta Ads)



Overview



We’re an ecommerce brand selling physical products through Meta Ads 
 and Instagram). We need a video creator who can produce high-converting short-form video ads using AI tools. This is NOT a traditional editing role — we need someone who can think like a marketer, understand our product and audience deeply, and create ads that sell.



You will receive a detailed brand briefing and avatar document with everything you need to understand the product, the customer, and what messaging works. Your job is to use that foundation to create fresh, diverse video ads — coming up with your own concepts, writing scripts, generating visuals with AI, and delivering final edited videos ready to run.



We also expect you to use AI tools like Claude to help you write scripts, develop hooks, and brainstorm angles — as long as the output is aligned with our brand guidelines.



Responsibilities



- Create performance-focused video ads designed to convert (not just look good)

- Write your own scripts and develop concepts based on our brand brief and avatar document

- Use AI tools to generate avatars (UGC-style talking heads), B-roll, product shots, and voiceovers

- Produce a mix of formats: UGC testimonials, product showcase videos, creative/process videos — not just one type on repeat

- Capture attention with compelling hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

- Edit final videos with subtitles, transitions, sound, and music

- Deliver multiple variations with different hooks, angles, and pain points

- Continuously propose new angles and formats to test — creative diversity is key

- Use AI assistants (like Claude) to help develop scripts, brainstorm ideas, and refine messaging while staying aligned with the brand voice

- Implement feedback and revisions quickly

- Communicate proactively if anything is unclear



Day-to-Day Tasks



- Study the brand brief and avatar document to deeply understand the product and customer

- Develop video concepts and write scripts for each ad (different angle per video)

- Generate AI visuals: talking-head avatars, lifestyle scenes, product shots, B-roll

- Generate voiceovers using ElevenLabs or similar tools

- Edit everything together in CapCut or similar: subtitles, transitions, sound effects, music

- Deliver finished videos in 9:16 vertical format (1080x1920) with subtitles, ready for Meta

- Propose new creative ideas and angles based on performance feedback



What We’re Looking For



- Experience creating video ads for ecommerce / direct response (Meta Ads preferred)

- Strong understanding of what makes people stop scrolling and click — hooks, pain points, urgency

- Hands-on experience with AI video generation tools (Kling, Veo, HeyGen, Hedra, or similar)

- Experience with AI voice tools (ElevenLabs or similar)

- Comfortable using AI assistants like Claude or ChatGPT to develop scripts and marketing copy

- Ability to write scripts independently — not just edit from provided footage

- Creative thinker who can propose new formats and angles, not just execute instructions

- Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

- English fluency (all content is in English for USA market)



What We Offer



- Consistent, ongoing work — we need new creatives every week

- A brand with a clear direction, detailed briefs, and product reference materials ready for you

- Room to grow: if you deliver strong work and we click, this becomes a stable long-term role with increasing responsibility and pay

- Creative freedom within clear guidelines — we want your ideas, not just your hands

title: Shopify & Amazon Store Operations Specialist
description:
Baie Botanique is an award-winning natural skincare brand selling internationally through Shopify and Amazon.

We are looking for a highly organised E-commerce Operations Specialist to support the day-to-day running of our Shopify stores and Amazon marketplaces and ensure everything operates smoothly.



Salary: 35,000 PHP



We are a small, experienced team looking for a reliable long-term tea
mber to grow with us..





**IMPORTANT:**

You must be comfortable working **UK hours (8am – 5pm Monday to Friday)**





What a Typical Week in This Role Looks Like



In this role, your week will involve a mix of operational tasks across our Shopify and Amazon stores.

Typical activities include:



• Checking Shopify and Amazon stores to ensure listings, pricing and content are accurate

• Monitoring customer orders and coordinating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Updating product pages, collections and website content using Shopify

• Tracking inventory levels across fulfilment locations

• Supporting improvements to product pages and store layout

• Responding to occasional customer
s relating to orders or deliveries (customer volume is generally low)

• Helping document operational processes as the business grows



Most tasks are operational and process-driven, with clear systems and support from the team.



1. Store & Marketplace Management



• Ensuring Shopify and Amazon listings are accurate and up to date

• Adding new products and maintaining existing listings

• Updating product pages, collections and site content

• Improving product page clarity and layout

• Troubleshooting issues with listings or pages



2. Orders, Fulfilment & Inventory



• Monitoring orders across Shopify and Amazon

• Communicating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Tracking inventory across locations

• Coordinating stock transfers between UK, EU and US fulfilment centres

• Reviewing fulfilment invoices and resolving discrepancies



3. Customer & Wholesale Support



• Responding to customer
s relating to orders and deliveries

• Resolving order issues or address updates

• Supporting communication with wholesale partners where required

• Assisting with marketplace partner coordination





4. Operational Improvements



• Helping document operational processes

• Supporting improvements to workflows and reporting

• Keeping systems organised as the business grows



General Operational Support



You may occasionally assist with additional operational tasks that support the wider e-commerce team.





Key Qualities We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who:

- Works quickly, communicates proactively, and keeps tasks moving without delays

- Has hands-on experience with Shopify and/or Amazon, not just theoretical or support-level work

- Takes ownership of tasks and follows through without needing constant direction

- Is highly organised and detail-oriented

- Is comfortable working with product data, inventory tracking, and spreadsheets

- Can work independently and solve problems without step-by-step instruction



Benefits

• Full-time long-term remote position

• Work directly with an established international skincare brand

• Annual skincare allowance

• UK public holidays off

• Additional 5 days annual leave

• Stable working hours (UK time: 8am–5pm Monday–Friday)

• Opportunity to grow with the company as our e-commerce operations expand



You should already be comfortable working inside Shopify and ideally have some experience with Amazon.



Application Instructions

Please include the following in your application:

• Your CV (PDF preferred)

• A short introduction describing your experience with Shopify and Amazon

- 2 examples of Shopify stores or pages you have worked on



At the start of your application message, please include the word:

BOTANICAL

This helps us confirm that you have read the full job description.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing themselves and discussing their Shopify and Amazon experience.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Content / Clipping Specialist)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and experienced video editor who specializes in short-form content clipping. Your main role will be to take long-form videos or raw footage and turn them into engaging clips for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels. This is a full-time remote position for 4–6 hours per day, every day, at a rate of $3 USD per hour.



In this role, you will be responsible for identifying engaging 
nts from longer videos and turning them into short clips between 15–60 seconds. You will add captions, subtitles, and on-screen text, as well as basic edits such as zoom cuts, sound effects, and transitions to keep the content engaging. You will also format videos vertically (9:16) and upload/post them to TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels. Consistency and the ability to deliver daily output are very important.



Applicants must have proven experience with video clipping for short-form content and understand current trends on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. You should know how to create strong hooks within the first few seconds of a video and keep viewers engaged. Experience using editing tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar software is required. A stable internet connection and the ability to meet daily deadlines are essential. Basic English skills are needed for captions and understanding content.



Experience working with content creators, podcasts, or social media brands is a plus, as well as the ability to identify viral 
nts and creatively enhance videos with engaging edits.



The pay is $3 USD per hour for 4–6 hours per day, with payments sent weekly or biweekly depending on preference.



To apply, please send a short introduction about yourself, links to your previous short-form editing or clipping work, the editing software you use, and your availability.



We are looking for someone long-term who is reliable, consistent, and understands viral content.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant – High-Level Performer Only
description:
Salary: $800–$1,500/month based on experience (higher for the right person)

Schedule: Full-time, 9am–5pm Philippine Time

Start: Immediately

Commitment: Long-term with regular pay increases and room for growth



?? This role is NOT for beginners. We're looking for someone who has real experience, takes ownership of their work, and gets things right the first time. If you're looking to "learn the basics" or just need any job, this isn't the one. But if you're the kind of person who takes pride in accuracy, figures things out on your own, and wants to grow with a brand that's scaling fast, keep reading.



------



About The Lytbox Academy:



Lytbox Academy (founded in 2020) is an online education brand with a rapidly growing YouTube channel, a private community of 1,700+ members on Circle, and courses with hundreds of students. We need the right person to help run the day-to-day so the founder can focus on content, growth, and the big picture.



The most important role in any company is the assistant. That's why we're looking for a rockstar.



-----



Who You Are:



You're not just looking for a paycheck but want more. You're the kind of person who:

- Picks up new tools fast because you know how to learn

- Catches mistakes before they become problems

- Takes ownership, you don't wait to be told what to do

- Cares about getting it right, not just getting it done

- Communicates clearly and isn't afraid to ask questions when something is unclear



-----



What You'll Be Doing:



Community Management (in Circle Communities)

- Manage our Circle community day-to-day — onboarding, organization, member support

- Set up, monitor, and troubleshoot workflows and automations

- Keep things running smoothly so nothing slips through the cracks



Notion Management

- Build, maintain, and organize databases, systems, and documentation

- This isn't basic Notion, you'll work with relations, rollups, filters, and views

- Keep everything structured and easy to navigate



WordPress Administration

- Navigate the WordPress backend and work with plugins like Fluent Communities and Fluent CRM

- Setting up newsletters and
 campaigns in our CRM

- You won't be building websites  or writing content, but you need to be comfortable inside WordPress and willing to learn new tools



YouTube Channel Support

- Update video titles, descriptions, tags, and metadata

- No editing required — just accurate, detail-oriented channel maintenance



Students & Membership Support

- Handle student and member inquiries with care

- Process refunds and manage account changes accurately

- Respond to
s on behalf of Jeffrey



Organization & Bookkeeping

- Manages
s

- Track payments, expenses, and subscriptions inside Notion databases

- Keep all numbers organized and up to date

- You don't need to be an accountant, but you do need to be comfortable managing numbers and keeping things tight



-----



What You're Getting:



This isn't just a job, it's a long-term role with real growth.

.

- Room to grow: As Lytbox grows, so does your role (and salary).

- Regular pay increases based on performance.

- Holiday time off: Quality of life is very important with Lytbox.

- You'll learn a lot. You're going to be exposed to community building, content creation, AI tools, and running an online education business. If you're curious and driven, you'll learn and build many new skills.

- Real support. You won't be thrown into the deep end alone. Jeffrey is hands-on and supportive, but he needs someone who can take the ball and run with it.



-----



How to Apply:



Important: Start your application with the word "Lytbox." Applications that don't follow this instruction will not be reviewed.

Then answer these three questions:



1. Have you used Notion before? If yes, describe the most advanced thing you've built in it.

2. Have you used WordPress before? If yes, what plugins or tools have you worked with?

3. Why do you think you'd be a great fit for this role?



We're only accepting a limited number of applications. Make yours count.
