title: Lead Architect
description:
ZoDen is a design- and construction-focused firm specializing in residential projects throughout the United States. We collaborate closely with homeowners, contractors, and consultants to deliver practical, code-compliant, and well-documented residential designs suitable for permitting and construction.



Position Overview:

ZoDen is seeking a full-time Architect with proven experience in U.S. residential construction to join our team in a fully remote capacity. This role requires strong technical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently while coordinating with distributed project teams.

The ideal candidate is comfortable managing projects from early design through permitting and construction support, and is familiar with U.S. codes, zoning requirements, and residential construction practices.



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare complete residential architectural drawing sets for permitting and construction.

Develop design concepts, floor plans, and construction details compliant with U.S. building codes and local jurisdiction requirements.

Coordinate remotely with structural and MEP consultants, contractors, and clients.

Respond to plan review comments and revise drawings per AHJ requirements.

Review RFIs, shop drawings, and construction documents for design compliance.

Provide remote construction support and attend virtual coordination meetings.

Maintain clear documentation and adherence to project scope, budget, and schedule.



Required Qualifications:

Professional degree in Architecture (B.Arch or M.Arch).

3–5+ years of experience in U.S. residential architecture and construction.

Strong understanding of U.S. building codes, zoning, and permitting processes.

Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, or equivalent architectural software.

Experience producing detailed and permit-ready construction documents.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment.

Strong written and verbal communication skills.



Preferred Qualifications:

Licensed Architect or actively pursuing licensure.

Experience with residential renovations, additions, and single- or multi-family projects.

Familiarity with construction administration and contractor coordination.



What We Offer:

Fully remote, full-time position

Long-term role with consistent project workload.

Collaborative and professional team environment.

Competitive compensation based on experience.

title: Property Management experienced in Rentec Direct
description:
About Us



Crown Realty Experts is a professional U.S.-based real estate company providing residential and commercial property management services. We are seeking an experienced, detail-oriented Property Manager Assistant who is highly familiar with online property management software and capable of handling a fast-paced, high-volume workload with precision.



This position requires excellent organizational skills, strong communication, and the ability to work independently while following very clear instructions. Applicants must also have prior experience in lease and tenant management.



Key Responsibilities



Manage daily operations inside platforms like AppFolio, Rentec, Buildium, or similar



Answer tenant and owner inquiries via phone and



Schedule repairs and coordinate with vendors for maintenance requests



Prepare lease renewals and monitor lease expirations



Assist with rent collection processes and leasing activities



Maintain digital files and tenant records



Perform basic bookkeeping and accounting functions



Respond to occasional emergency calls (paid extra for after-hours coverage)



Support other administrative tasks as needed by the real estate team



Minimum Requirements



At least 1 year of experience using an online property management portal



Accounting or bookkeeping background



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



Strong attention to detail and ability to follow multi-step processes



Ability to self-manage time and tasks with minimal supervision



A friendly and professional demeanor



Access to a quiet work environment and stable internet



Willingness to handle minimal after-hours calls (with premium pay)



???? Compensation



Rates are based on experience level and proven ability:



$5.00 – $7.00/hour – Beginner (1–2 years of experience)

Solid foundation in real estate or property management support. Able to handle routine admin tasks, data entry, and basic tenant/vendor communication. Willing to learn new systems.



$7.25 – $8.50/hour – Intermediate (3–5 years of experience)

Strong background in property management support, social media execution, and real estate admin. Comfortable with multiple software platforms. Demonstrated reliability and consistency.



$8.50 – $10.00/hour – Expert (6+ years of experience)

Proven track record in property management, real estate operations, and commercial real estate support. Skilled at handling complex admin systems, creating SOPs, and managing multiple properties or accounts with little supervision.



Application Instructions – Read Carefully



Applicants who do not follow the instructions below will not be considered.



Begin your cover letter with this exact phrase as the title:

BEST ASSISTANT – I Use [Insert Portal Name]

(Example: BEST ASSISTANT – I Use Buildium)



In your cover letter, include at least six bullet points that clearly explain how your experience aligns with the job description above. Each point should be specific and relevant.



You must also include:



Your updated resume



Your DISC profile results (screenshot or link)



Confirmation that your OnlineJobs.ph profile is 100% complete with education, job history, background confirmation, and skills



A statement of which property management portal(s) you’ve used and for how long



Confirmation of your availability for CST-based work hours and minimal after-hours support



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.



Hiring Process



Application and material review



Skills test related to property management tasks



Scenario-based interview



Paid trial assignment



Final onboarding



Note: Initial pay is set during onboarding based on the compensation tiers above.



Performance Review Metrics (90 Days)



Accuracy of lease and billing tasks



Timeliness of maintenance coordination and communication



Recordkeeping and task organization



Proactive support and ability to follow through



Professionalism and reliability under time pressure

title: Creator Relations Assistant (Virtual Assistant)
description:
We are looking for a motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant to join our team as a Creator Relations Assistant. This is a remote position with both full-time and part-time opportunities available. Full-time roles require up to 8 hours per day, 7 days per week, while part-time roles will involve fewer hours depending on availability. The pay ranges from $1 to $5 USD per hour depending on experience and performance, with additional bonuses available based on results.



In this role, you will be responsible for supporting creators by managing daily interactions and maintaining consistent communication across platforms. Your main focus will be engaging with audiences, responding to messages in a timely and professional manner, and helping maintain strong relationships between creators and their followers. You will also assist in following communication guidelines, tracking activity, and ensuring consistency in tone and responses.



We are looking for someone who is highly responsive, detail-oriented, and comfortable communicating frequently throughout the day. You should be able to handle multiple conversations at once while staying organized and maintaining quality interactions. A strong work ethic and consistency are very important for this role.



Previous experience in customer service, sales, social media management, or online communication is preferred but not required. Basic English skills are required, along with a stable internet connection. You should be proactive, coachable, and able to follow instructions closely.



Compensation ranges from $1 to $5 USD per hour depending on experience and performance, with opportunities for bonuses based on output and results.



To apply, please send a short introduction about yourself, any relevant experience, your availability (part-time or full-time), and why you would be a good fit for this role.



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who are consistent, reliable, and ready to grow with the company.

 & SMS Marketing Specialist to take full ownership of our lifecycle marketing.

 list

description:

We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and results-driven Shopify Analyst & Growth Specialist to join our team on a part-time basis. This role is ideal for someone with strong analytical skills and a proven track record of growing eCommerce businesses.

Analyze Shopify store performance, including traffic, conversion rates, and sales trends

title: Quality Assurance (QA) Manager - Home Care Operations
description:
Job Title

Quality Assurance (QA) Manager – Home Care Operations



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Company: OPA Home Care

Reports To: Director of Operations



Role Overview

OPA Home Care is seeking a Quality Assurance Manager responsible for ensuring operational accuracy across our core service workflows.



This role functions as the final quality gate before operational work reaches leadership.



The QA Manager will review operational outputs, identify process failures, and ensure that work produced by the operations tea
ets OPA’s standards for accuracy, completeness, and professionalism.



The position is process-oriented and requires strong attention to detail, structured thinking, and the ability to enforce standards consistently.



Core Responsibilities

The QA Manager is responsible for quality control across the following operational areas:



Referral and Intake

Review referral intake records for accuracy and completeness



Verify correct client demographic and service data



Ensure referral documentation is properly recorded in the system



Scheduling

Audit caregiver schedules for accuracy and coverage



Verify caregiver assignments match client care plans



Review missed-shift i
 and identify process failures



Documentation

Review caregiver visit notes for completeness and accuracy



Ensure documentation meets operational and compliance standards



Track missing or incomplete documentation



Billing Preparation

Verify visit data and documentation required for billing



Ensure service records are accurate before submission



Quality Reporting

Maintain a QA tracking system identifying recurring operational errors



Produce weekly quality reports for operations leadership



Recommend process improvements when errors repeat



Key Outcomes

The QA Manager is accountable for the following outcomes:



Metric Target

Operational documentation accuracy 100%

Referral intake accuracy 100%

Scheduling audit compliance 100%

Error detection before leadership review >95%

The QA Manager ensures work is correct before it reaches leadership review.



Required Qualifications

3+ years experience in quality assurance, auditing, or operational review



Experience reviewing administrative workflows or documentation



Strong attention to detail and ability to detect errors



Strong written English communication



Comfortable working with operational systems and spreadsheets



Experience with healthcare operations, BPO quality assurance, or administrative auditing preferred



Preferred Experience

Experience in one or more of the following areas is strongly preferred:



Home care or healthcare operations



Quality assurance in BPO environments



Medical documentation review



Operational compliance auditing



Skills Required

Structured thinking



High attention to detail



Ability to enforce operational standards



Strong organizational discipline



Ability to identify root causes of recurring operational errors



Work Style

This role requires someone who:



notices small inconsistencies others overlook



prefers structured processes and checklists



is comfortable enforcing quality standards



takes ownership of accuracy and process improvement



About OPA Home Care

OPA Home Care provides in-home care services to older adults and individuals who require assistance with daily living.



Our company is built around the following core values:



Attention to Detail



Reliability



Strong Work Ethic



Efficiency



Coachability



Self-Starter mindset



Lagniappe – delivering a little extra



We are building systems that ensure every client receives dependable, high-quality care.



Compensation

Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



Typical range for this role:



Location Monthly

Philippines $1,200 – $1,500 / month

Application Instructions

Applicants should submit:



Resume



Short description of prior QA or operational review experience



Example of a process or workflow they have improved



Hiring Filter (Important)

Candidates who succeed in this role typically demonstrate:



exceptional attention to detail

title: Social Media Editor
description:
We’re looking for a Social Media Editor who gets the internet. You’ll be creating and editing short-form videos and visuals designed to go viral — not just exist. If you’re chronically online, obsessed with trends, and know why content blows up, this role was made for you.



Why You’ll Love This Role:

*Fully remote — work from anywhere

*No micromanaging

*Paid training + ongoing feedback

*Creative, supportive, non-toxic team

*Real growth opportunities into senior creative or strategy roles

*You get paid to do what you already do for fun



What You’ll Be Doing:

You’ll be editing and creating content that’s meant to perform, not just look pretty.



*Editing viral-style short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

s, and Gen Z humor

*Helping social media pages grow through smart, trend-driven content

*A genuine love for social media and content creation

*A good eye for visuals, pacing, and aesthetics

*Confidence, curiosity, and positive energy

*Willingness to learn, test ideas, and improve fast

* Having a personal brand or active social media account is a plus, not a requirement.

*Link to your creative portfolio

* Add the word 'Awesome' to your application so we know you've read everything

External / Contract / Fractional



BOSS MGMT GRP



BOSS MGMT GRP is seeking an experienced AI & Automation Implementation Specialist to help modernise and optimise the way our business operates.



This is not a theoretical advisory role. We are looking for a highly capable external specialist who can assess our current workflows, identify high-value opportunities for AI and automation, implement practical systems improvements, and help oversee the rollout of new tools, platforms, and automations across the business.



You will work closely with leadership to improve the efficiency, intelligence, and scalability of our operations across creator management, brand partnerships, outreach, onboarding, CRM, internal knowledge, reporting, and administrative workflows.



If you are someone who knows how to move from strategy to execution and from ideas to live systems, we want to hear from you.



About BOSS MGMT GRP



BOSS MGMT GRP is a global creator management and commercial partnerships company operating across talent, liaison, media, and digital services. We work across the creator economy, with a strong focus on commercial representation, operational excellence, and the development of scalable systems that support both internal teams and external partners.



As we continue to grow, we are investing in AI, automation, and smarter infrastructure to improve how we operate, communicate, onboard, track, and execute across the business.



The Role



We are looking for an external specialist to help us:



 - review and assess our current workflows, systems, and operational processes

 - identify where AI can be meaningfully embedded into day-to-day work

 - recommend and help implement the right platforms, automations, and integrations

 - improve internal efficiency, visibility, documentation, and execution

 - support the rollout, adoption, and governance of new systems across the business



This role is ideal for someone who combines strong commercial thinking with hands-on systems implementation experience.



Key Responsibilities



Your responsibilities may include:



 - conducting an audit of current workflows, tools, and operational bottlenecks

 - identifying high-impact AI and automation opportunities across the business

 - designing and implementing practical workflow improvements

 - recommending and helping configure suitable tools, software, and platforms

 - overseeing integrations across systems such as CRM,
, cloud storage, forms, contracts, reporting tools, and automation platforms

 - improving data flow, process clarity, and internal visibility

 - creating documentation, SOPs, and implementation frameworks

 - training internal tea
mbers on new systems and processes

 - supporting the business in building a more scalable, AI-enabled operational environment



Areas of Focus



This role is expected to contribute across areas such as:



 - AI-enabled workflow design

 - CRM and data process optimisation

 - outreach and follow-up automation

 - onboarding automation

 - document and knowledge management

 - meeting summary, task extraction, and internal workflow support

 - process documentation and system governance

 - dashboarding, reporting, and operational oversight

 - implementation of additional software tools where needed



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who has:



 - proven experience implementing AI and automation solutions inside real businesses

 - strong systems thinking and process design capability

 - experience working across operations, CRM, internal workflows, and business automation

 - the ability to assess messy or fragmented workflows and turn them into clean, scalable systems

 - hands-on implementation experience, not just advisory experience

 - strong communication skills and the ability to work with non-technical stakeholders

 - a commercial mindset with clear judgement around practicality, efficiency, and ROI

 - experience with modern business tools, integrations, and automation platforms



Ideal Experience



Highly relevant backgrounds may include experience with:



 - AI workflow implementation

 - automation platforms such as Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar

 - CRM systems such as HubSpot, Attio or equivalent

 - Google Workspace ecosystems

 - internal knowledge systems and AI-assisted search

 - process mapping and SOP creation

 - systems integration and rollout

 - team enablement and change management



What Success Looks Like



Success in this role means:



 - identifying and prioritising the most valuable AI and automation opportunities

 - reducing manual admin and operational friction

 - improving execution speed and internal consistency

 - implementing systems that are actually used by the team

 - creating better visibility across workflows and information

 - leaving the business with stronger infrastructure, cleaner processes, and clear documentation



Engagement Structure



This is expected to begin as an external contract or fractional engagement, with an initial focus on audit, roadmap, and implementation. We are open to different engagement models depending on experience and fit, including project-based, retained, or phased structures.



To Apply



Please send through:



 - a short introduction

 - your relevant experience

 - examples of businesses, systems, or workflows you have helped improve

 - examples of AI and automation work you have implemented

 - your preferred engagement structure

 - your hourly/monthly rates or proposed commercial model

 - applications without specific examples of automations or systems you have built will not be considered.



Please also include anything that helps demonstrate how you think, build, and deliver.



 resume to:




 &

title: AI & Automation Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT: We will ONLY entertain applicants who apply through this link:



Applications submitted via OnlineJobs.ph messages will NOT be reviewed.



CAMPAIGN CREATORS is looking for an AI & Automation Specialist who can build, think, and execute.



This is not your typical marketing role.



If you enjoy working with AI tools, building automations, and turning ideas into real, working systems, this role is for you. We’re looking for someone who doesn’t wait for perfect instructions, but instead figures things out, tests ideas, and improves them over time.



You’ll be working at the intersection of:

- AI (ChatGPT, OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

- Automation (n8n, Zapier, workflows)

- HubSpot (automation, data, lifecycle)

- Integrations (APIs, system connections)



Your mission is simple:

Turn ideas into systems that make the team faster, smarter, and more efficient.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN:

Centralized ownership across:

1. AI Systems & Agents

- Design and deploy AI agents (CMS architecture, AEO, internal & external tools, automation).

- Build and refine custom GPTs and prompt frameworks.

- Improve outputs, consistency, and usability over time.

2. HubSpot AI & Automation

- Leverage HubSpot AI tools (Breeze, workflows, automation layers).

- Extend HubSpot functionality through integrations and external tools.

- With direction, build AI workflows that improve lifecycle execution to drive leads and sales for the agency.

3. Automation & Tooling

- Build automations using tools like ChatGPT / OpenAI API, n8n, Relevance AI, Claude, Gamma/Genspark, Other emerging AI platforms

- Create agency marketing systems that reduce manual effort and increase speed

4. Integrations & System Connectivity

- Support and build integrations between HubSpot and other platforms.

- Work with APIs to move and structure data effectively.

- Contribute to internal tools and integration libraries.

5. Prompt Engineering & Logic

- Develop structured prompts and frameworks for repeatable outputs.

- Improve how AI tools are used across the agency marketing department.

- Ensure outputs meet quality, brand, and strategic standards.

- Propose and implement smarter ways of working.

-Continuously refine processes using AI and automation.





WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Build and deploy AI-driven workflows and automations

- Create and refine GPTs, prompts, and AI tools

- Work on integrations and improve system connectivity

- Prototype ideas and bring them to life (“vibe coding”)

- Identify inefficiencies and proactively solve them

- Work closely with leadership to execute on new initiatives

- Stay current on AI tools, trends, and capabilities

- Document and standardize what you build for scalability





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

- Experience working with AI tools (ChatGPT, OpenAI, etc.)

- Familiarity with automation platforms (n8n, Zapier, Relevance AI, etc.)

- Understanding of HubSpot workflows, automation, and data structure

- Comfortable working with APIs and system logic

- Highly resourceful and able to figure things out independently

- Strong problem-solving mindset

- Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

- Naturally curious and stays ahead of emerging tools and trends





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE:

- Faster execution across internal and client work

- Reduced manual effort through automation

- AI tools that are actually used and deliver value

- Improved quality and consistency of outputs

- Scalable systems that support team efficiency

- A growing set of internal tools and workflows

title: Senior Magento 2 Full-Stack Developer (Microservices Focus)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Full-Stack Magento 2 Developer with strong architectural skills to help scale and evolve our e-commerce platform.



This role goes beyond standard Magento development. The ideal candidate will be capable of transitioning a Magento-based system into a modern microservices architecture, while maintaining and improving existing functionality.



Key Responsibilities



Design, develop, and maintain Magento 2 (Adobe Commerce) applications

Lead the migration from Magento monolith to microservices architecture

Architect scalable backend systems and APIs

Develop and maintain frontend components and user experience

Apply patches, upgrades, and performance optimizations

Integrate Magento and microservices with external systems (ERP, APIs, etc.)

Ensure system reliability, scalability, and maintainability

Requirements



5+ years experience as a Magento 2 Full-Stack Developer

Proven expertise in PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

Strong experience with Magento Enterprise (Adobe Commerce)

Demonstrated experience in system architecture and microservices design

Experience building and consuming REST/GraphQL APIs

Experience working with large and complex product catalogs

Strong understanding of scalable, distributed systems

Fluent in English (written and verbal)

Nice to Have



Experience migrating monolithic platforms to microservices architecture

Experience in the automotive aftermarket industry (vehicle fitment data is a plus)

Magento (Adobe Commerce) certification

Experience with Adobe Commerce Cloud

Experience with AWS or similar cloud infrastructure

Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

What We Offer



100% Remote Work

Full-time position

Opportunity to lead a major architectural transformation

Work on complex, high-scale e-commerce systems

Ideal Candidate



You are not just a developer—you are a problem solver and system thinker who can:



Work within Magento today

Design what comes next

Execute a clean transition to a scalable microservices ecosystem

title: Email Marketing Copywriting & Strategist
description:
Email Marketing Copywriter & Strategist for InnovaGuest



Hiring combined D2C
 Copywriter &
 Marketing Strategist that is creative, fast, flexible, strategic, a great direct response writer, fluent in English & have 2-4+ years of experience, to work with & drive bookings conversions for hospitality brands. 



What we’re looking for:



InnovaGuest is looking for a 10/10 copywriter & marketing strategist to join our growing hospitality CRM &
 marketing agency, who can take on the role of both
 marketing strategist & D2C/direct response
 copywriter for our clients. For us, these two roles go hand-in-hand.



This is a freelance role, ideal for dedicated & professional writers seeking ongoing, long-term collaboration.





You will own copywriting &
 marketing strategy for numerous restaurant, hotel & vacation rental clients, across
 campaigns, automations, pop-ups, loyalty schemes & more.



You must be well-versed in copywriting techniques, frameworks & levers that can help us drive bookings, sales & conversions for hospitality clients, including restaurants, hotels, vacation rentals & more. Experience writing for hospitality or ecommerce brands is preferred.



I'm NOT looking for a writer that relies on ChatGPT or Claude to do the work for them. I AM looking for a writer that can clearly cut through the AI slop & deliver writing that is stylistically unique, punchy, full of personality & of course, optimised to drive results for our clients. 



You should NOT apply if you are not comfortable owning
 marketing strategy or if you have zero experience developing strategies. You SHOULD apply if you have experience building & writing strategies for
 marketing clients. You SHOULD apply if you're comfortable leading strategy development, being proactive instead of waiting to be told what you should do. 



We need a team collaborator to join our fun, friendly & sociable group, willing to strategise with the rest of the team. You should be fast & flexible, able to turn around 8-10
s per day, with short turnaround times. You should be comfortable using AI as a part of your workflow, for ideation, iteration, strategy development, draft development & productivity.  



About Us:



InnovaGuest is a young, growing agency that's already generated £100,000’s for UK-based hospitality clients. We’re looking for a team player that wants to grow with us long-term, building the role & making their mark.



If you have previous experience working with other agencies, we want your skills & expertise, as well as your experience with systems, processes, tools & best practices.

The perfect candidate can help grow InnovaGuest & make the company better. The perfect candidate will also have opportunities to grow into senior roles as we grow.



What the Role Involves Day-to-Day:

Copywriting:

- Create high-converting
 campaigns & automations for hospitality audiences. 

- Maintain brand consistency, turning existing brand voice guidelines & SOPS into writing with unique personality, voice, style & verbatim.

- Collaborate with our designers to turn your words into designed
s, with suggestions for imagery or design features.

- Turn narrative ideas into writing that drives action, bookings 7 sales.

- Use AI tools like Claude (skills) to improve your writing, drive productivity & increase efficiency/turnaround times.





Marketing Strategy:

- Develop marketing strategies for our clients, including automation sequence structure & bespoke campaign calendars.

- Turn meeting briefs & client priorities into actionable strategies, using proven
 narratives or campaign ideas.

- Collaborate with our designers, presenting ideas & guiding
 design layout & structure.

- Turn creative
 ideas into marketing that drives action, bookings 7 sales.





Additional Copywriting Tasks:

- Pop-Up Form & Landing Page Copy.

- Loyalty Scheme Copy.

- Lead Magnet & Downloadables Copy.

- Occasional Ad-Hoc Writing Tasks.





Strategic Input & Collaboration:

- Attend strategy meetings with clients.

- Develop creative strategies to deliver events, offers, messages, etc.

- Push back on requests that would hurt conversion.

- Collaborate with the team directly (including graphic designer & account manager).

- Bring ideas proactively, don't wait to be asked.





What Success Looks Like:

After 90 days, you'll be a high-performing copywriter/strategist if you are able to achieve these benchmarks:

- Consistent, creative, high-quality
 copy & narratives that our clients love.

- Brand voice mastery, aligned with the tone, voice, style & personality of our clients.

- Creative strategy & ideas that are translating to successful campaigns/automation, that drive results for our clients.

- Subject lines, preview text &
 copy that drives high open rates & high bookings conversion rates. 

- Consistently hitting deadlines & managing short turnaround times.

- Consistently delivering 8-10
 drafts per day, without sacrificing quality.





What You Need For the Role:

- Must be completely fluent in English, understanding British, North American & AUS/NZ locale distinctions/colloquialisms.

- Must be available for 20+ hours/week.

- 2-4+ years of copywriting experience 
 & marketing writing experience preferred).

- Deep understanding of brand voice, style & personality.

- Deep understanding of copywriting frameworks, levers, tactics & techniques. 

- Deep understanding of marketing strategy, long-term vision & campaign narratives.

- Understanding of the relationship between copywriting & design. 

- DTC brand experience (hospitality experience strongly preferred).





Character Skills Required:

- Fast-mover, able to handle same-day or next-day revisions.

- Creativity that guides strategy, willing to try new ideas.

- Strategic, seeing the bigger picture beyond just the
s.

- Proactive at suggesting improvements, flagging issues, not waiting to be told.

- Collaborative team player, with both tea
mbers & clients.

- Positive, enthusiastic and passionate, bringing everybody up.





Compensation & Benefits:

- $8-12 Hourly rate, that increases over time.

- Fully remote, work from anywhere, with time & timezone flexibility.

- Opportunities to grow into senior & leadership roles.

- $520 yearly Language Learning Stipend (after 3-month trial period).

- Work with leading hospitality brands, including Michelin Star restaurants & multi-location groups/chains.

title: YouTube Video Editor & Content Optimizer for Balloon Decor Channel
description:
About the Channel:

The Balloon Boutique Studio is a YouTube channel dedicated to balloon decorating tutorials, event decor inspiration, and behind the scenes content. We currently have 6,800+ subscribers and are actively growing toward 10,000. Our audience includes balloon artists, event planners, DIY decorators, and party enthusiasts.



About the Role:

I am looking for a talented, detail-oriented, and reliable video editor who can take my raw long-form footage and transform it into polished, engaging YouTube content that matches the fun and festive personality of the channel. This is not just an editing role — you will also be responsible for optimizing each video for search and creating Shorts from long-form content. This is a part-time ongoing role with the potential to grow.



Your Responsibilities:



Edit long-form YouTube tutorial and event videos from raw footage

Add captions, lower thirds, and text overlays where needed

Color grade footage for a warm, vibrant, and professional look

Add background music at appropriate levels without overpowering original audio

Create YouTube Shorts from long-form videos to maximize reach

Write SEO-optimized video titles for both long-form videos and Shorts

Write keyword-rich video descriptions

Research and provide relevant hashtags for every video

Suggest and create SEO-optimized thumbnail title text

Deliver edited videos within agreed turnaround time





You Are the Right Fit If You:



Have experience editing YouTube tutorial or lifestyle content specifically

Have a portfolio of long-form YouTube videos you have edited

Understand YouTube SEO — titles, descriptions, tags, and hashtags

Are proficient in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Have experience creating YouTube Shorts from long-form content

Have a strong eye for pacing, color, and storytelling

Are reliable, communicative, and meet deadlines consistently

Can work independently with minimal supervision

Are comfortable with creative, colorful, and fun content





Requirements:



Minimum 1 year of YouTube video editing experience

Demonstrated understanding of YouTube SEO and content optimization

Stable internet connection

Own computer with video editing software

Available for a weekly check-in via Zoom or Messenger

Able to receive feedback professionally and make revisions promptly





Revision Policy:

Each video includes up to two rounds of revisions. Additional revision requests beyond that will be discussed on a case by case basis.



To Apply:



Please send the following:

Your resume

Links to at least 2 YouTube videos you have edited

A brief note telling me why you are the right fit for this channel

Your available start date



Important: Place the words "BALLOON STAR" in the subject line of your application. Applications that do not include this in the subject line will not be considered. Applications without portfolio links will also not be considered.

title: CLIENT SUCCESS MANAGER
description:
We are seeking a proactive, client-focused Account Manager who will serve as the primary point of contact for assigned clients. This role is responsible for managing client relationships, ensuring client needs are met, supporting renewals and upsells, and collaborating with internal teams to deliver high-quality service.



The ideal candidate is organized, adaptable, and comfortable handling both client-facing and internal coordination responsibilities.



## Key Responsibilities



**Client Relationship Management**

- Serve as the main liaison between clients and the organization

- Build and maintain strong, long-term client relationships

- Conduct regular client check-ins to review business needs and satisfaction

- Act as the client advocate to ensure expectations are met and exceeded



**Account Support and Retention**

- Welcome and onboard new clients

- Address client concerns and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner

- Track and manage ongoing client requests and deliverables

- Renew existing subscriptions and maintain account continuity



**Revenue Growth and Upselling**

- Identify opportunities to expand services and increase client profitability

- Support upsell initiatives within assigned accounts

- Collaborate with leadership on action plans to drive revenue growth



**Internal Coordination and Support**

- Collaborate with internal departments to fulfill client needs

- Attend meetings, provide updates, and document action items when required

- Support assigned projects and campaigns across departments

- Perform research and administrative tasks as requested by supervisors



**Data and Process Management**

- Collect and analyze client and consumer behavior data

- Maintain accurate client records and documentation

- Track processes related to client requests and outcomes



**Marketing and Communication Support**

- Assist with social media updates and content creation as needed

- Draft basic copy for posts and client communications when required



## Requirements

- High School graduate or equivalent education and or experience

- Strong client-facing and communication skills with a professional demeanor

- Ability to take ownership of client issues and drive them to resolution

- Comfortable working collaboratively across multiple departments

- Strong verbal and written communication skills

- Ability to multitask and manage competing priorities

- Able to perform well under pressure in a fast-paced environment

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools

- Advanced social media experience is a plus

- Sales experience of 1 to 2 years is an advantage but not required



If you think you're the one we're looking for, kindly send us your updated CV along with a 1-2min self intro. Thank you!
